items.name: Are Ya Chicken?
items.campaign: A Grand Tour of the Sword Coast
restrictions: Must have completed "The Cursed Farmer"
Four slots in your formation are occupied by chickens.

items.name: Mad Cow Disease
items.campaign: A Grand Tour of the Sword Coast
restrictions: Must have completed "The Cursed Farmer" Must have completed 6 Grand Tour adventures or variants
Mad cows spawn randomly during the adventure Every few seconds they spit at a random hero, reducing their attack speed by 50% for 10 seconds

items.name: The Contagious Curse
items.campaign: A Grand Tour of the Sword Coast
restrictions: Must have completed "The Cursed Farmer" Must have completed 9 Grand Tour adventures or variants
Two random slots in your formation are cursed The curses change slots every 15 seconds Heroes in cursed slots are stunned and cannot attack.

items.name: Friendly Imps
items.campaign: A Grand Tour of the Sword Coast
restrictions: Must have completed "The Mad Wizard"
Three friendly imps take up slots in your formation and try to help you out Unfortunately, they're not very effective

items.name: Pure Energy
items.campaign: A Grand Tour of the Sword Coast
restrictions: Must have completed "The Mad Wizard" Must have completed 6 Grand Tour adventures or variants
"Pure Energy" enemies spawn randomly during the adventure They cannot be attacked or killed, and must be tanked until you can progress or your formation is overwhelmed

items.name: Maddening
items.campaign: A Grand Tour of the Sword Coast
restrictions: Must have completed "The Mad Wizard" Must have completed 9 Grand Tour adventures or variants
The damage of your heroes is reduced by 2% with each enemy killed as they slowly go mad This debuff resets when you change areas or defeat a boss

items.name: Were-verpowered
items.campaign: A Grand Tour of the Sword Coast
restrictions: Must have completed "Beast Intentions"
Were-beasts have their health, damage, and speed dramatically increased

items.name: A Persistent Buzzing
items.campaign: A Grand Tour of the Sword Coast
restrictions: Must have completed "Beast Intentions" Must have completed 6 Grand Tour adventures or variants
A random number of Giant Flies spawn with every enemy wave These extra monsters do not drop gold

items.name: Beast Mode
items.campaign: A Grand Tour of the Sword Coast
restrictions: Must have completed "Beast Intentions" Must have completed 9 Grand Tour adventures or variants
Your heroes do three times more damage, but attack a third as often

items.name: Low Initiative
items.campaign: A Grand Tour of the Sword Coast
restrictions: Must have completed "Terror in the Dark"
Your heroes attack half as often and enemies move twice as fast

items.name: March of the Undead
items.campaign: A Grand Tour of the Sword Coast
restrictions: Must have completed "Terror in the Dark" Must have completed 13 Grand Tour adventures or variants
Relentless Undead monsters spawn and attack your formation When they are killed, they don't disappear. Instead, after 5 seconds, they get back up and resume their relentless attack

items.name: Friend of Nature
items.campaign: A Grand Tour of the Sword Coast
restrictions: Must have completed "Terror in the Dark" Must have completed 15 Grand Tour adventures or variants

In addition to the core 12 Champions, you may only use Ranger, Druid, and/or Barbarian Champions.
Friendly animals take up slots in your formation. You start out with one slot taken up by a friendly animal, then every 50 areas a new animal joins your team, until there are 6 animals.

items.name: No Time To Rest
items.campaign: A Grand Tour of the Sword Coast
restrictions: Must have completed "Unearthed Evil"
Monsters spawn continuously (timer between spawns reduced to 1 second), but drop a quarter of the gold they normally do

items.name: Invisible Shadows
items.campaign: A Grand Tour of the Sword Coast
restrictions: Must have completed "Unearthed Evil" Must have completed 13 Grand Tour adventures or variants

Shadow monsters attack your formation randomly. Shadows are invisble and cannot be damaged until they reach you, then they are revealed and can take damage. Shadows move quickly and don't block spawns.

items.name: Waves of Evil
items.campaign: A Grand Tour of the Sword Coast
restrictions: Must have completed "Unearthed Evil" Must have completed 15 Grand Tour adventures or variants

In addition to the core 12 Champions, you may only use Evil Champions.
All monsters emanate waves of shadowy evil upon spawning and every 5 seconds after that. Each wave deals 10% max health damage against a random Champion.

items.name: The Farmer's Kids
restrictions: Must have completed "The Bandit's Harvest (Stoki)"
The Farmer's Daughter and Son take up two slots in the formation

items.name: Due Diligence
restrictions: Must have completed "The Bandit's Harvest (Stoki)"
Quest requirements are doubled

items.name: Wanton Necromancy
restrictions: Must have completed "The Bandit's Harvest (Stoki)"
Undead enemies randomly spawn alongside normal monster waves These extra monsters do not drop gold

items.name: Free Play (Stoki)
restrictions: Must have completed "The Bandit's Harvest (Stoki)"
No restrictions

items.name: Free Play
items.campaign: A Grand Tour of the Sword Coast
restrictions: Must have completed "Unearthed Evil"
No restrictions

items.name: Free Play
items.campaign: A Grand Tour of the Sword Coast
restrictions: Must have completed "Beast Intentions"
No restrictions

items.name: Free Play
items.campaign: A Grand Tour of the Sword Coast
restrictions: Must have completed "The Cursed Farmer"
No restrictions

items.name: Free Play
items.campaign: A Grand Tour of the Sword Coast
restrictions: Must have completed "The Mad Wizard"
No restrictions

items.name: Free Play
items.campaign: A Grand Tour of the Sword Coast
restrictions: Must have completed "Terror in the Dark"
No restrictions

items.name: The Crumbling Temple
restrictions: Must have completed "The Ring of Regeneration"
Bits of crumbling temple fall on your Champions every 8-10 seconds, dealing 40% damage to a random Champion

items.name: The Death Curse
restrictions: Must have completed "The Ring of Regeneration"
Every time a Champion is killed, their DPS is permanently reduced by 25% for the duration of the adventure (stacks multiplicatively)

items.name: Treasure Hunters
restrictions: Must have completed "The Ring of Regeneration"
Two slots are taken up by treasure hunters The treasure hunters steal gold, reducing your gold find rate by 99% The treasure hunters also nab 50% of the quest items that drop, just to be annoying

items.name: Free Play
restrictions: Must have completed "The Ring of Regeneration"
No restrictions

items.name: Useless Allies
restrictions: Must have completed "Seeking Allies"
Three useless adventurers join your party, taking up 3 formation slots Useless adventurers change slots every 25 areas

items.name: Premature Betrayal
restrictions: Must have completed "Seeking Allies"
Various Red Wizard of Thay enemies attack, each with a unique and annoying ability.

items.name: Cramped Quarters
restrictions: Must have completed "Seeking Allies"
Only dwarves, gnomes, kobolds, halflings, and goblins can be used

items.name: Free Play
restrictions: Must have completed "Seeking Allies"
No restrictions

items.name: Stealthy Pickpockets
restrictions: Must have completed "The Trickster's Delight (Krond)"
Stealthy pickpockets attack and steal some of your gold when they hit your formation

items.name: Costumed Foes
restrictions: Must have completed "The Trickster's Delight (Krond)"
Various costumed foes attack, each with a unique and annoying ability.

items.name: It's Getting Darker
restrictions: Must have completed "The Trickster's Delight (Krond)"
The night gets darker; each area you enter is a bit darker, reducing your gold find and increasing the health of the monsters.

items.name: Free Play (Krond)
restrictions: Must have completed "The Trickster's Delight (Krond)"
No restrictions

items.name: Respectful Restraint
restrictions: Must have completed "The Crypt of Legends (Gromma)"

Ultimate attacks cannot be used. 
Any attack with a cooldown of 5 seconds or less have an additional 3 second cooldown.

items.name: The Relentless Undead
restrictions: Must have completed "The Crypt of Legends (Gromma)"

Undead monsters have twice as much health as normal.
When an undead monster is reduced to 0 hit points, it is stunned for 10 seconds and then comes back to life with full health.

items.name: A Grand Nandventure
restrictions: Must have completed "The Crypt of Legends (Gromma)"

Gromma Nander must always be in your formation. 
Gromma has a 4x damage boost and her normal attack cooldown is reduced by 2 seconds.

items.name: Free Play (Gromma)
restrictions: Must have completed "The Crypt of Legends (Gromma)"
No restrictions

items.name: Flying Monkey Skulls of Doom
restrictions: Must have completed "Exploring Port Nyanzaru" Must have completed 5 Tomb of Annihilation adventures or variants
A random number of Flying Monkeys spawn with each wave and toss monkey skulls at your formation. These extra monsters do not drop gold

items.name: Crowded Streets
restrictions: Must have completed "Exploring Port Nyanzaru" Must have completed 7 Tomb of Annihilation adventures or variants
Slots in the formation are taken up by random citizens The slots change every 25 areas

items.name: Patience is Key
restrictions: Must have completed "Exploring Port Nyanzaru" Must have completed 17 Tomb of Annihilation adventures or variants
Only Champions with a base attack cooldown of 5 seconds or more can be used

items.name: Free Play
restrictions: Must have completed "Exploring Port Nyanzaru"
No restrictions

items.name: Dinosaur Racing
restrictions: Must have completed "Running of the Saurs" Must have completed 6 Tomb of Annihilation adventures or variants
Complete area 50 (and complete the adventure) within 30 minutes of starting the objective You've gotta go fast!

items.name: Market Fluctuations
restrictions: Must have completed "Running of the Saurs" Must have completed 8 Tomb of Annihilation adventures or variants
Leveling up your champions costs more than normal

items.name: Relay Race
restrictions: Must have completed "Running of the Saurs" Must have completed 21 Tomb of Annihilation adventures or variants

Each Champion can only be used to beat 150 unique areas A Champion counts as being "used" in an area if they're in the formation at any time during the attempt that beats an area for the first time After a Champion has been used while beating 150 unique areas, they can not be used in the formation anymore

items.name: Free Play
restrictions: Must have completed "Running of the Saurs"
No restrictions

items.name: Frightful Weather
restrictions: Must have completed "The Simril Spoilsport (Dhadius)" Costs 250 Candles to start
In areas where it is snowing (excluding boss areas), your party will take 1.7% of their max health as unavoidable damage every second.

items.name: Light in the Darkness
restrictions: Must have completed "The Simril Spoilsport (Dhadius)" Costs 625 Candles to start
Several slots in the formation are taken up by floating magical torches.

items.name: A Wise Endeavour
restrictions: Must have completed "The Simril Spoilsport (Dhadius)" Costs 1250 Candles to start
Only champions with a wisdom score of 13 or more, plus Dhadius (of course), may be used.

items.name: Free Play (Dhadius)
restrictions: Must have completed "The Simril Spoilsport (Dhadius)" Costs up to 2500 Candles to start
No restrictions

items.name: Close Escort
items.campaign: A Grand Tour of the Sword Coast
restrictions: Must have completed "Escort to Waterdeep"
Starting in area 11, and every 50 areas thereafter up to area 261, one more slot is taken up by a caravan wagon.

items.name: Constant Banditry
items.campaign: A Grand Tour of the Sword Coast
restrictions: Must have completed "Escort to Waterdeep" Must have completed 15 Grand Tour adventures or variants
Additional bandits spawn with each wave of enemies. These extra monsters do not drop gold

items.name: The Long Haul
items.campaign: A Grand Tour of the Sword Coast
restrictions: Must have completed "Escort to Waterdeep" Must have completed 18 Grand Tour adventures or variants
Only Champions with 14 or more Strength can be used

items.name: Free Play
items.campaign: A Grand Tour of the Sword Coast
restrictions: Must have completed "Escort to Waterdeep"
No restrictions

items.name: Lost in the Deep
items.campaign: A Grand Tour of the Sword Coast
restrictions: Must have completed "Waterdeep Detours"
Every 25 areas another bench seat is "lost" and unavailable for use

items.name: Easily Distracted
items.campaign: A Grand Tour of the Sword Coast
restrictions: Must have completed "Waterdeep Detours" Must have completed 16 Grand Tour adventures or variants
Every 15 seconds a random Champion gets distracted and has their DPS disabled for 30 seconds

items.name: Rude Welcome
items.campaign: A Grand Tour of the Sword Coast
restrictions: Must have completed "Waterdeep Detours" Must have completed 19 Grand Tour adventures or variants

Additional citizen "monsters" attack with each wave of enemies. The Butcher is immune to melee attacks. The Baker is immune to ranged and magic attacks. The Candlestick Maker stuns random champions. These extra monsters do not drop gold

items.name: Free Play
items.campaign: A Grand Tour of the Sword Coast
restrictions: Must have completed "Waterdeep Detours"
No restrictions

items.name: Overdue Rendezvous
items.campaign: A Grand Tour of the Sword Coast
restrictions: Must have completed "Underdeep Cartography"
Drizzt takes up a slot in your formation.

items.name: Durable Deep
items.campaign: A Grand Tour of the Sword Coast
restrictions: Must have completed "Underdeep Cartography" Must have completed 17 Grand Tour adventures or variants
Monsters now have armored hit-based health instead of normal health

items.name: Expert Opinion
items.campaign: A Grand Tour of the Sword Coast
restrictions: Must have completed "Underdeep Cartography" Must have completed 20 Grand Tour adventures or variants
An "expert" takes up a slot in the formation and debuffs the damage of all adjacent Champions

items.name: Free Play
items.campaign: A Grand Tour of the Sword Coast
restrictions: Must have completed "Underdeep Cartography"
No restrictions

items.name: The Chatty Map
restrictions: Must have completed "The Merry Map Misadventure (Barrowin)"
The map is extremely chatty. Every 15 seconds it engages in deep conversation with a random Champion in your formation, disabling their Attack for 15 seconds.

items.name: The Cult of Daggers
restrictions: Must have completed "The Merry Map Misadventure (Barrowin)"
Dagger-throwing Cultists spawn alongside normal waves and toss daggers at random Champions in your formation. These additional monsters drop no gold.

items.name: Only the Strong Survive
restrictions: Must have completed "The Merry Map Misadventure (Barrowin)"
Only Champions with a Strength stat of 13 or higher can be used.

items.name: Free Play (Barrowin)
restrictions: Must have completed "The Merry Map Misadventure (Barrowin)"
No restrictions

items.name: Deadwinter Date
restrictions: Must have completed "Deadwinter Day (Regis)" Costs 250 Giftboxes to start
You must escort two Harpell wards through the entire adventure.

items.name: Deadwinter Fey
restrictions: Must have completed "Deadwinter Day (Regis)" Costs 625 Giftboxes to start

A large number of pixies and sprites spawn with each wave of enemies. When a pixie or sprite is killed, they sprinkle a random Champion with pixie dust. Any champion sprinkled with 10 pixie dust has their Attack disabled. Pixie dust stacks reset when you change areas.

items.name: Deadwinter Pay(-back)
restrictions: Must have completed "Deadwinter Day (Regis)" Costs 1250 Giftboxes to start
Every time you defeat an enemy (in a non-boss area) your Champions take 10% unavoidable damage. Champions adjacent to Regis take only 1/3rd of that damage. Regis himself is immune to this damage.

items.name: Free Play (Regis)
restrictions: Must have completed "Deadwinter Day (Regis)" Costs up to 2500 Giftboxes to start
No restrictions

items.name: The Haunted Jungle
restrictions: Must have completed "The Templar's Camp" Must have completed 9 Tomb of Annihilation adventures or variants
Specters appears at random, slowly moving towards your formation If a specter reaches your formation it instantly kills your front-most Champion and disappears

items.name: Poor Guidance
restrictions: Must have completed "The Templar's Camp" Must have completed 9 Tomb of Annihilation adventures or variants

Your normal jungle guide is unavailable. Instead, an ill-informed guide takes up the formation's central slot. Every 10 seconds, the ill-informed guide disables the damage of a random Champion for 20 seconds.

items.name: Overwhelming Force
restrictions: Must have completed "The Templar's Camp" Must have completed 26 Tomb of Annihilation adventures or variants
All enemies deal 50% more damage and move 20% faster for each enemy alive

items.name: Free Play
restrictions: Must have completed "The Templar's Camp"
No restrictions

items.name: Pros and CONs
restrictions: Must have completed "Rescue in the Jungle" Must have completed 8 Tomb of Annihilation adventures or variants
Only Champions with a CON score of 13 or higher may be used

items.name: Upholding the Law
restrictions: Must have completed "Rescue in the Jungle" Must have completed 10 Tomb of Annihilation adventures or variants
Only Lawful Champions may be used

items.name: Starving in the Jungle
restrictions: Must have completed "Rescue in the Jungle" Must have completed 12 Tomb of Annihilation adventures or variants
Gold drops are reduced by 2% in each area, stacking multiplicatively. Your Champions take 4% unavoidable damage every second in non-boss areas.

items.name: Free Play
restrictions: Must have completed "Rescue in the Jungle"
No restrictions

items.name: Three's a Crowd
restrictions: Must have completed "The Missing Merchants (Birdsong)"
Any Champion that is adjacent to more than 1 other Champion has their damage reduced to 0

items.name: Pair Up
restrictions: Must have completed "The Missing Merchants (Birdsong)"
The ratio of women to men in your formation cannot be off by more than 1

items.name: Love Potion
restrictions: Must have completed "The Missing Merchants (Birdsong)"

Every 25 areas, two champions drink a Philter of Love and become charmed by each other. If you bring these two Champions together (make them adjacent to each other), they will buff each other's damage and your formation's damage.

items.name: Free Play (Birdsong)
restrictions: Must have completed "The Missing Merchants (Birdsong)"
No restrictions

items.name: Wet Feet
items.campaign: A Grand Tour of the Sword Coast
restrictions: Must have completed "The Silken Swamp"
Champions have a random chance, on attack, to step in the swamp getting "wet feet," which reduces their attack speed by 50% for 3 attacks

items.name: Hatchlings Underfoot
items.campaign: A Grand Tour of the Sword Coast
restrictions: Must have completed "The Silken Swamp" Must have completed 17 Grand Tour adventures or variants

Spider hatchlings spawn with every wave. These additional monsters drop no gold. If they reach the formation they get stepped on, killing the spider but dealing poison damage to the Champion who stepped on them.

items.name: Don't Look Up!
items.campaign: A Grand Tour of the Sword Coast
restrictions: Must have completed "The Silken Swamp" Must have completed 17 Grand Tour adventures or variants
At random a spider drops down from a web above a formation slot, poisoning the Champion in that slot, reducing their damage by 99% for 15 seconds.

items.name: Free Play
items.campaign: A Grand Tour of the Sword Coast
restrictions: Must have completed "The Silken Swamp"
No restrictions

items.name: Heavy Burden
items.campaign: A Grand Tour of the Sword Coast
restrictions: Must have completed "Supply Run"
The supplies you are carrying are heavy. Every 30 seconds 3 heavy packages are randomly assigned to Champions in your formation. Champions carrying a heavy package are stunned for the duration.

items.name: On the Hunt
items.campaign: A Grand Tour of the Sword Coast
restrictions: Must have completed "Supply Run" Must have completed 17 Grand Tour adventures or variants
Every 50 areas a slot is taken up by a hunter, who attacks with a bow dealing a percentage of your formation's DPS.

items.name: Friends of the Forest
items.campaign: A Grand Tour of the Sword Coast
restrictions: Must have completed "Supply Run" Must have completed 17 Grand Tour adventures or variants
An assortment of deadly forest animals attack your formation, each with their own annoying abilities.

items.name: Free Play
items.campaign: A Grand Tour of the Sword Coast
restrictions: Must have completed "Supply Run"
No restrictions

items.name: Thunder and Lightning
restrictions: Must have completed "The Unfair Sea (Zorbu)"

In outdoor areas, lightning strikes your formation every 5 seconds, dealing 90% of max health to a random Champion. If Zorbu "Thunderbolt" Natten is struck by lightning, his next normal attack does 10x its normal damage.

items.name: Crashing Waves
restrictions: Must have completed "The Unfair Sea (Zorbu)"
Only two of your formation's columns can do damage at any time. The two columns change every 10 areas.

items.name: The Shipwright's Ball
restrictions: Must have completed "The Unfair Sea (Zorbu)"
Two shipwrights take up slots in the formation. Every 15 seconds, the shipwrights swap the position of two Champions adjacent to them.

items.name: Free Play (Zorbu)
restrictions: Must have completed "The Unfair Sea (Zorbu)"
No restrictions

items.name: Anti-Dexterous Explorers
restrictions: Must have completed "Homecoming"
Only Champions with a DEX score of 14 or lower can be used

items.name: Struggling Toward Omu
restrictions: Must have completed "Homecoming" Must have completed 11 Tomb of Annihilation adventures or variants
Only Champions with a CHA score of 13 or lower can be used.

items.name: Wagon Train
restrictions: Must have completed "Homecoming" Must have completed 13 Tomb of Annihilation adventures or variants
A wagon takes up a slot in the formation. Every 100 areas an additional wagon joins your train, taking up another slot.

items.name: Free Play
restrictions: Must have completed "Homecoming"
No restrictions

items.name: Not Very Charming
restrictions: Must have completed "The Lost Heir of Omu"
Only Champions with a CHA score of 14 or lower can be used

items.name: Lobsterfolk Assault
restrictions: Must have completed "The Lost Heir of Omu" Must have completed 12 Tomb of Annihilation adventures or variants
Aldani spawn randomly with each wave. These extra enemies don't drop gold.

items.name: Taking Responsibility
restrictions: Must have completed "The Lost Heir of Omu" Must have completed 14 Tomb of Annihilation adventures or variants
Asharra starts out in your formation and can not be removed or swapped out. Only Asharra and Champions with Asharra's chosen bond can deal damage.

items.name: Free Play
restrictions: Must have completed "The Lost Heir of Omu"
No restrictions

items.name: Foolish Variance
restrictions: Must have completed "A Fool's Errand (Strix)" Costs 250 Pennants to start
Champions' damage randomly varies between 0.1% and 199.9% of their displayed damage on each hit

items.name: Persistent Foolishness
restrictions: Must have completed "A Fool's Errand (Strix)" Costs 625 Pennants to start
The Drunken Fool spawns randomly from time to time. The Drunken Fool has a number of special annoying abilities.

items.name: Like Father Like Son
restrictions: Must have completed "A Fool's Errand (Strix)" Costs 1250 Pennants to start

The Farmer's Son takes up a slot in the formation. The Son moves around the formation every 25 areas. Every 20 seconds, in non-boss areas, the Son foolishly summons a Frost Giant to attack the formation. If Strix is adjacent to the son, he doesn't summon Frost Giants.

items.name: Free Play (Strix)
restrictions: Must have completed "A Fool's Errand (Strix)" Costs up to 2500 Pennants to start
No restrictions

items.name: Whispers
restrictions: Must have completed "The Endless War (Nrakk)" Costs 250 Bouquets to start

The Elder Brain's whispers slowly drive your Champions mad When a Champion gets a killing blow, they gain a random number of stacks of a debuff When the debuff reaches 100 stacks, they are stunned for 15 seconds

items.name: Flower Power
restrictions: Must have completed "The Endless War (Nrakk)" Costs 625 Bouquets to start
Several sentient flower enemies spawn at random in non-boss areas When killed, the flowers imbue the Champion who killed them with a random power, which can be either good or bad

items.name: Unlikely Allies
restrictions: Must have completed "The Endless War (Nrakk)" Costs 1250 Bouquets to start
Two Githzerai monks take up slots in the formation Each monk increases the DPS of Nrakk by 400% if he is adjacent to them (stacks multiplicatively)

items.name: Free Play (Nrakk)
restrictions: Must have completed "The Endless War (Nrakk)" Costs up to 2500 Bouquets to start
No restrictions

items.name: The Wolves in the Woods
restrictions: Must have completed "The Grandfather Acorn (Catti-brie)" Costs 250 Leaves to start
Werewolf enemies spawn randomly with a variety of abilities. Catti-brie's silver arrows deal double damage to these particular werewolves. These additional monsters do not drop gold.

items.name: Critter Companions
restrictions: Must have completed "The Grandfather Acorn (Catti-brie)" Costs 625 Leaves to start
Two forest critters take up slots in the formation. These critters move around the formation every 25 areas. They also buff the damage of adjacent Champions by 400%.

items.name: Catti-alone
restrictions: Must have completed "The Grandfather Acorn (Catti-brie)" Costs 1250 Leaves to start

Catti-brie is the only Champion allowed; she starts in the formation at level 1 and with increased health. Catti-brie's damage is increased by 40% per area, stacking multiplicatively. Catti-brie attacks 3 times faster than normal and her Ultimate cooldown is set to 10 seconds.

items.name: Free Play (Catti-brie)
restrictions: Must have completed "The Grandfather Acorn (Catti-brie)" Costs up to 2500 Leaves to start
No restrictions

items.name: Periodic Petrification
restrictions: Must have completed "The Forbidden City"
Every 15 seconds a random Champion is petrified for up to 60 seconds Killing a monster reduces the stun time for all currently petrified champions by 5 seconds

items.name: No Good at All
restrictions: Must have completed "The Forbidden City" Must have completed 13 Tomb of Annihilation adventures or variants
Only neutral and evil Champions can be used. No good allowed.

items.name: Fall From Grace
restrictions: Must have completed "The Forbidden City" Must have completed 15 Tomb of Annihilation adventures or variants
Every 15 seconds, your Champion with the highest damage has their damage reduced by 99.99% for 60 seconds. This effect can stack.

items.name: Free Play
restrictions: Must have completed "The Forbidden City"
No restrictions

items.name: Home Field Advantage
restrictions: Must have completed "Captured!"
All yuan-ti enemies power up each second they're alive, gaining health and damage

items.name: Double Vision
restrictions: Must have completed "Captured!" Must have completed 14 Tomb of Annihilation adventures or variants
All spawns are doubled, including bosses Duplicated enemies drop no gold and don't count towards quest progress

items.name: Underground Railroad
restrictions: Must have completed "Captured!" Must have completed 16 Tomb of Annihilation adventures or variants
Three slots in the formation are taken up by various slaves from the prisoner pits.

items.name: Free Play
restrictions: Must have completed "Captured!"
No restrictions

items.name: The Neverending March
restrictions: Must have completed "The Mechanical Menace (Evelyn)" Costs 250 Rusted Gears to start
Defeated modrons shut down for 5 seconds and then reactivate with full health This effect does not trigger in boss areas

items.name: (Hu)man vs. Machine
restrictions: Must have completed "The Mechanical Menace (Evelyn)" Costs 625 Rusted Gears to start
Only human champions can be used The damage of all human champions is increased based on the area you are in

items.name: Charge Into Battle
restrictions: Must have completed "The Mechanical Menace (Evelyn)" Costs 1250 Rusted Gears to start
Enemies move 4x faster and deal 100x damage to everyone except Evelyn Evelyn starts the adventure at level 1 and in the front slot of the formation

items.name: Free Play (Evelyn)
restrictions: Must have completed "The Mechanical Menace (Evelyn)" Costs up to 2500 Rusted Gears to start
No restrictions

items.name: Street War
restrictions: Must have completed "A Mysterious Summons"
Whenever you kill Zhentarim or Xanathar mercenaries, the other faction's minions get stronger

items.name: Force Grey Unleashed
restrictions: Must have completed "A Mysterious Summons" Must have completed 4 Dragon Heist adventures or variants
Only members of Force Grey are usable on this adventure. You start with Calliope unlocked and in formation. The support of Waterdeep provides Champions with a small DPS boost in each area.

items.name: Vajra's Guards
restrictions: Must have completed "A Mysterious Summons"
Vajra has asked that 3 Stone Golems accompany you on your adventures. I'm sure she's not monitoring them at every moment.

items.name: Free Play
restrictions: Must have completed "A Mysterious Summons"
No restrictions

items.name: Wisdom Check
restrictions: Must have completed "Building Trust"
Champions base damage is modified by their Wisdom modifier

items.name: Sleuth It Out
restrictions: Must have completed "Building Trust" Must have completed 5 Dragon Heist adventures or variants
Only Champions with an INT score of 12 or higher can partake in this adventure

items.name: The Newcomers of Notoriety
restrictions: Must have completed "Building Trust" Must have completed 9 Dragon Heist adventures or variants

Baeloth thought it would be fun to split the party, allowing the newcomers to enjoy his illusions! You can only use Event Champions in this adventure. No core or evergreen champions allowed. Fancy red pandas in top hats riding unicycles attack with each wave of enemies. They drop no gold, nor do they count towards quest progress. The fancy red pandas deal 400% additional damage. Watch out!

items.name: Free Play
restrictions: Must have completed "Building Trust"
No restrictions

items.name: Awaken the Beasts
restrictions: Must have completed "Let Sleeping Dragons Lie (Binwin)" Costs 250 Dragon Claws to start
Beast enemies move more quickly (3x) and deal more damage (4x).

items.name: Binwin's Minions
restrictions: Must have completed "Let Sleeping Dragons Lie (Binwin)" Costs 625 Dragon Claws to start
Two useless minions take up slots in the formation; they move every 20 areas. They massively debuff adjacent Champions except for Binwin, whom they massively buff.

items.name: Untrusting
restrictions: Must have completed "Let Sleeping Dragons Lie (Binwin)" Costs 1250 Dragon Claws to start
Bronze wyrmlings spawn in every area with various powers.

items.name: Free Play (Binwin)

- Their damage is increased by 40% per area, stacking multiplicatively
- They both attack three times as fast as normal and their Ultimate cooldown is reduced to 30 seconds if it isn't already below that

A drow cultist empowered by the sign of Ur appears in every area. When killed, the cultist drops a Tetrathanotic Glyph, which increases the damage of Champions with an INT score of 13+ by 5%. items.name: More Like The Scream Team

The Devourer now appears as an additional area 25 boss, in addition to its normal role as the area 50 boss. As if that wasn't scary enough, the Devourer now only takes 8 seconds to devour a Champion, down from 10. The dialog on this adventure is slightly tweaked.

items.name: Free Play (K'thriss)
restrictions: Must have completed "Deadwinter Day (K'thriss)"
No restrictions

items.name: Extra DEXterous
restrictions: Must have completed "The Unfair Sea (Black Viper)" Costs 1250 Fresh Fishes to start
Champions gain buffs or debuffs based on their DEX score. Some low DEX Champions may be detrimental to your progress, while high DEX ones will be extra helpful!

items.name: Free Play (Black Viper)
restrictions: Must have completed "The Unfair Sea (Black Viper)" Costs up to 2500 Fresh Fishes to start
No restrictions

A Strix escort starts in your formation. The Strix escort attacks the nearest enemy every 3 seconds with a fireball that deals 10 seconds of BUD damage in a small area.
Rosie's attack speed is increased by 300%, her ultimate attack cooldown is reduced to 45 seconds, and her ultimate root now lasts for 15 seconds.
Rosie deals 45% additional damage, starting in area 2 and increasing by another 45% each area, stacking multiplicatively.

items.name: Free Play (Rosie)
restrictions: Must have completed "A Fool's Errand (Rosie)"

items.name: Ride the Storm
restrictions: Must have completed "The Endless War (Aila)" Costs 1250 Bouquets to start

Aila starts at level 10 at the front of your formation and can not be moved. Aila's Storm Aura hits two enemies with each strike. Only enemies affected by Aila's Primed or Electrified states can be damaged.

items.name: Free Play (Aila)
restrictions: Must have completed "The Endless War (Aila)" Costs up to 2500 Bouquets to start

items.name: Elves Are Wild

All elves and half-elves in your formation have their base attack cooldown reduced by 0.5 seconds. All drow enemies have additional armor-based health Additional Eladrin spawn in each area and are immune to damage until they attack.

items.name: Alignment Askew
restrictions: Must have completed "The Grandfather Acorn (Spurt)" Costs 1250 Leaves to start

Basic attack cooldowns are increased based on the number of lawful champions in the formation. Damage is decreased based on the number of neutral champions in the formation. Ultimate attack cooldowns are increased based on the number of chaotic champions in the formation.

restrictions: Must have completed "The Grandfather Acorn (Spurt)" Costs up to 2500 Leaves to start
No restrictions

restrictions: Must have completed "The Mechanical Menace (Qillek)" Costs up to 2500 Rusted Gears to start

restrictions: Must have completed "Let Sleeping Dragons Lie (Korth)"

items.name: Aww, Hells Nuts

items.name: Magical Misadventure
restrictions: Must have completed Reclaiming the Past (Jim)
Only Champions whose base attacks are magic can be used.

items.name: Center of the Multiverse

items.name: Free Play (Jim)
restrictions: Must have completed Reclaiming the Past (Jim)
No restrictions

items.name: Iron Stomach

items.name: Army of Bahamut
restrictions: Must have completed Brightly into Darkness (Turiel)
Turiel starts out in slot 1 and can't be moved or replaced. Only Lawful and/or Good Champions can be used.

items.name: DPS's Day Off
restrictions: Must have completed Brightly into Darkness (Turiel)
No Champions with the DPS role can be used.

items.name: Free Play (Turiel)
restrictions: Must have completed Brightly into Darkness (Turiel)
No restrictions

items.name: Think Your Way Out Of It
restrictions: Must have completed "The Guardian of Orolunga"
Only champions with an INT score of 13 or higher can partake.

items.name: Air's Getting Pretty Thin
restrictions: Must have completed "The Guardian of Orolunga" Must have completed 30 Tomb of Annihilation adventures or variants
Champions' damage is decreased as they climb higher up the temple, based on their CON score (see debuff icon in-game for more details).

items.name: Red Wizard 'Escort'
restrictions: Must have completed "The Guardian of Orolunga" Must have completed 52 Tomb of Annihilation adventures or variants

Bubbles brought us a friend from the future! Wait, is that right? Rath Modar, the infamous Red Wizard, joins the formation to learn of the fall of his Red Wizards in Chult. Don't worry, Bubbles vouched for him. Two additional Red Wizards spawn with each wave. All Red Wizards each have 4 armored HP that must be cleared before they are defeated. Only Champions with INT of 12 or lower can be used.

items.name: Free Play
restrictions: Must have completed "The Guardian of Orolunga"
No restrictions

items.name: A Saurial's Lament
restrictions: Must have completed "The Lost Love"
Dragonbait takes up a slot in the formation and mourns the loss of his friend, Artus. Every 10 areas Dragonbait's scent changes, empowering the enemies or debuffing the champions.

items.name: A Saurial's Resolve
restrictions: Must have completed "The Lost Love" Must have completed 35 Tomb of Annihilation adventures or variants

Dragonbait once again accompanies your formation, taking up the front slot. He does not attack, but provides a buff to the party while alive. Valindra Shadowmantle resurrects once per boss fight for every 50 areas into the adventure you are. Each time she resurrects she greatly increases her damage and health. Each time Valindra ressurects, Dragonbait's resolve grows stronger, increasing his health, damage reduction, and the buff he provides.

items.name: Spirit of the Trickster Gods
restrictions: Must have completed "The Lost Love" Must have completed 63 Tomb of Annihilation adventures or variants

Bubbles joins the formation and brings the spirit of the trickster gods with her! That's good, right?! Various trickster gods affect the formation throughout the adventure, granting a boon or a bane to the formation. The trickster god rotates every 5 areas.

items.name: Free Play
restrictions: Must have completed "The Lost Love"
No restrictions

items.name: The Killer Mists
items.campaign: A Grand Tour of the Sword Coast
restrictions: Must have completed "Flies on the Wall"
All Champions take damage over time based on their CON score while in misty/snowing areas. The higher the CON score, the lower the relative damage.

items.name: Class Vacation
items.campaign: A Grand Tour of the Sword Coast
restrictions: Must have completed "Flies on the Wall"
There's a conference in Baldur's Gate for certain classes. Bards, Barbarians, Clerics, and Druids can not be used.

items.name: A Nod from Strahd
items.campaign: A Grand Tour of the Sword Coast
restrictions:
Must have completed "Flies on the Wall"
Must have completed 29 Grand Tour adventures or variants
In each boss area Strahd on Horseback appears. You must defeat this additional boss to advance. When defeated, he runs off the screen. Only champions with INT of 13 or higher can be used.

items.name: Free Play
items.campaign: A Grand Tour of the Sword Coast
restrictions: Must have completed "Flies on the Wall"
No restrictions

items.name: Diversity Day-Trip
items.campaign: A Grand Tour of the Sword Coast
restrictions: Must have completed "Backtracking Through Barovia"
Only one of each species is allowed in your formation at a time.

items.name: Late Game
items.campaign: A Grand Tour of the Sword Coast
restrictions:
Must have completed "Backtracking Through Barovia"
Must have completed 25 Grand Tour adventures or variants
Champions in seats 1-4 are unavailable (Bruenor through Jarlaxle's seats). Only Champions in seats 5 or higher (Calliope or higher) can be used.

items.name: Shadowfell Stalwarts
items.campaign: A Grand Tour of the Sword Coast
restrictions:
Must have completed "Backtracking Through Barovia"
Must have completed 31 Grand Tour adventures or variants

Each wave spawns 1-3 shadar-kai warriors. They don't drop gold, nor do they count towards quest progress. Each boss area spawns 1 Shadar-Kai Soul Monger, a boss with 20 hits-based HP. When the Soul Monger hits a Champion with a melee attack, that Champion is defeated. You must defeat this additional boss to advance. Fog encroaches in each area.

items.name: Free Play
items.campaign: A Grand Tour of the Sword Coast
restrictions: Must have completed "Backtracking Through Barovia"
No restrictions

items.name: Nimblest Escape
restrictions: Must have completed "Nimble Escape"
Only Champions with a DEX score of 14 or higher may be used.

items.name: Stumbling Escape
restrictions: Must have completed "Nimble Escape" Must have completed 10 Dragon Heist adventures or variants
Only Champions with a DEX score of 13 or lower may be used.

items.name: Distracted Escape
restrictions:
Must have completed "Nimble Escape"
Must have completed 27 Dragon Heist adventures or variants

Champions adjacent to Mirt deal no damage due to his distracting presence. Only good and evil Champions may be used. At the start of each area, an Iron Defender with 10 armored HP appears. Other monsters are invulnerable while the Iron Defender is there.

items.name: Free Play
restrictions: Must have completed "Nimble Escape"
No restrictions

items.name: From The Shadows
restrictions: Must have completed "Fugitives"
Since you're on the run you must be discreet and attack from the shadows. Only Champions whose base attack is ranged or magic can be used.

items.name: Spined Nuisances
restrictions: Must have completed "Fugitives" Must have completed 11 Dragon Heist adventures or variants
Super powered Spined Devils appear at random and attack the party These devilish foes come with a variety of annoying abilities

items.name: Twilight Twist
restrictions:
Must have completed "Fugitives"
Must have completed 31 Dragon Heist adventures or variants

Two Shadar-Kai warriors join the formation. Champions next to the Shadar-Kai are so filled with existential angst that their base attack cooldown speed is doubled. Orcus has sent his minions to slow you down. 1-3 Relentless Ghouls appear with every wave. When they are killed, Relentless Ghouls don't disappear. Instead, after 5 seconds, they get back up and start attacking again. They do not drop gold, or count towards quest progress.

items.name: Free Play
restrictions: Must have completed "Fugitives"
No restrictions

items.name: Screams of the Dead
items.campaign: A Grand Tour of the Sword Coast
restrictions: Must have completed "Excavating History"
On boss areas, a former boss appears with the active boss, causing you to fight through your fears and regrets.

items.name: Frantic Excavation
items.campaign: A Grand Tour of the Sword Coast
restrictions: Must have completed "Excavating History"
Monsters move twice as fast. Only Champions with a base attack cooldown of 5 seconds or lower can be used.

items.name: Birds of a Feather
items.campaign: A Grand Tour of the Sword Coast
restrictions:
Must have completed "Excavating History"
Must have completed 33 Grand Tour adventures or variants
One raven fills the formation in slot 8. When a Champion is knocked out, they don't recover until after defeating a new boss area.

items.name: Free Play
items.campaign: A Grand Tour of the Sword Coast
restrictions: Must have completed "Excavating History"
No restrictions

items.name: Guests of the Groom
items.campaign: A Grand Tour of the Sword Coast
restrictions: Must have completed "Towering Expectations"

Barovian wedding "guests" have filled the castle in preparation of Strahds nuptials. Two of them take up space in the formation, causing each of the Champions to randomly do between 0.1% and 199.9% of their actual damage with each hit.

items.name: Careful Consideration
items.campaign: A Grand Tour of the Sword Coast
restrictions: Must have completed "Towering Expectations"
Only Champions with a WIS score of 13 or higher can be used.

items.name: Tanking Expectations
items.campaign: A Grand Tour of the Sword Coast
restrictions:
Must have completed "Towering Expectations"
Must have completed 70 Grand Tour adventures or variants

A random Tanking Champion is immediately unlocked, added to the formation, can't be removed, and can't be moved.
Other Champions with the Tanking role cannot be used. 
Enemies move 300% faster, have 300% more health, and deal 300% more damage.

items.name: Free Play
items.campaign: A Grand Tour of the Sword Coast
restrictions: Must have completed "Towering Expectations"
No restrictions

items.name: Bazaar Exploits
restrictions: Must have completed "Hopelessly Lost"
Two goblins accompany your party. They each take up a formation slot and change locations every 25 areas. Xanathar Guild enemies take additional damage.

items.name: Flame(skull) War
restrictions: Must have completed "Hopelessly Lost"
All gold found is reduced by 99%. Trenzia's Flameskull spawns in each area, and has her damage increased by 200%.

items.name: Servants of the Demon Prince
restrictions:
Must have completed "Hopelessly Lost"
Must have completed 35 Dragon Heist adventures or variants

In Non-Boss levels, each wave creates an extra 1-3 random undead. They do not drop gold, or count towards quest progress. In Boss levels, an additional random boss must also be defeated to advance. Only Champions with INT of 14 or higher may be used.

items.name: Free Play
restrictions: Must have completed "Hopelessly Lost"
No restrictions

items.name: Elder Rune Madness
restrictions: Must have completed "Enter the Sargauth"

Each time you encounter the portal in area 25 (and repeats of area 25 in 75, 125, 175, etc.) you are affected by a different elder rune, debuffing the party in some way for the next 50 areas. See the buffs area in the top-right corner of the game for further details on each debuff.

items.name: The Madness Grows
restrictions: Must have completed "Enter the Sargauth"
All Champions in the even seats have disappeared. They probably abandoned you. Or maybe they are the sounds you hear from the shadows?

items.name: The Madness Peaks
restrictions:
Must have completed "Enter the Sargauth"
Must have completed 40 Dragon Heist adventures or variants

All champions in the odd seats have disappeared. They're all out to get you.
Each wave spawns a Hallucination with 5 armored hits. They drop no gold, nor do they count towards quest progress.

items.name: Free Play
restrictions: Must have completed "Enter the Sargauth"
No restrictions

items.name: Bullywugs in the Bog
items.campaign: A Grand Tour of the Sword Coast
restrictions: Must have completed "Who Lurks in Lurkwood"
Two bullywugs take up slots in the formation

items.name: Modrons in the Mud
items.campaign: A Grand Tour of the Sword Coast
restrictions: Must have completed "Who Lurks in Lurkwood"
A Monodrone and a Duodrone take up slots in the formation. They're interesting, but they don't do much else. Only Champions with CHA of 14 or lower can be used.

items.name: And a Pixie in a Pear Treant
items.campaign: A Grand Tour of the Sword Coast
restrictions:
Must have completed "Who Lurks in Lurkwood"
Must have completed 74 Grand Tour adventures or variants

A Pixie in a Pear Treant joins the formation. They're so big they take up three spots in your formation, but don't do much else.
Only Champions with a CON of 12 or lower can be used.

items.name: Free Play
items.campaign: A Grand Tour of the Sword Coast
restrictions: Must have completed "Who Lurks in Lurkwood"
No restrictions

items.name: An Abyssal Situation
items.campaign: A Grand Tour of the Sword Coast
restrictions: Must have completed "Orcs Are Wild"
Armored abyssal chickens spawn in each area These chickens drop no gold and do not count towards quest progress Every 10 areas the number of abyssal chickens that spawn in each area increases by 1

items.name: Dino Nightmare
items.campaign: A Grand Tour of the Sword Coast
restrictions: Must have completed "Orcs Are Wild"

Illusory dinosaurs spawn in each area. They drop no gold nor do they count towards quest progress. Champion's base attack cooldown is increased by 100%. Asharra, Azaka, Birdsong, and Jamilah each deal 400% more damage and are not affected by the base attack cooldown change.

items.name: A Familiar Friend
items.campaign: A Grand Tour of the Sword Coast
restrictions:
Must have completed "Orcs Are Wild"
Must have completed 78 Grand Tour adventures or variants

Moogin the Swarm of Quippers joins the formation. Only Champions next to Moogin can deal damage with normal attacks. This does not affect Ultimate attacks. Enemies have +4000% health, but take an additional 10% damage each time they take damage, applied multiplicably, up to a max of 40 stacks.

items.name: Free Play
items.campaign: A Grand Tour of the Sword Coast
restrictions: Must have completed "Orcs Are Wild"
No restrictions

items.name: Underdark Reinforcements
restrictions: Must have completed "The Bandit's Harvest (Pwent)"

Extra strong Drow Cultists spawn in each area. The additional Drow cannot be damaged until they have been bled by Pwent. Pwent starts in the formation but can be moved or swapped out normally if you wish.

items.name: The Plague Cometh
restrictions: Must have completed "The Bandit's Harvest (Pwent)"

Cursed cows spawn in each area. If they hit a Champion, the Champion contracts a Curse. Cursed Champions deal no damage and have their max health reduced by 50%. Every 5 seconds the Curse spreads to adjacent Champions. It is only removed by changing areas.

items.name: Somebody's Poisoned The Well!
restrictions: Must have completed "The Bandit's Harvest (Pwent)"

Pwent starts out in the formation and can not be moved, removed, or swapped out. Champions take damage equal to 20% of their maximum health every time they attack due to the poison. Pwent is immune to this poison.

items.name: Free Play (Pwent)
restrictions: Must have completed "The Bandit's Harvest (Pwent)"
No restrictions

items.name: Costumed Fans
restrictions: Must have completed "The Trickster's Delight (Avren)"
Two costumed fans join the formation, ready to be Champions! Unfortunately they're not Champions, so they just take up space.

items.name: Next Time, Champions!
restrictions: Must have completed "The Trickster's Delight (Avren)"
Each time you face the Masked Man, he has another trick up his sleeve. His attacks and strategy changes each time you engage him in combat.

items.name: The Clone War
restrictions: Must have completed "The Trickster's Delight (Avren)"

One of Avren's cloning vats was stolen and corrupted. Avren starts in the formation and can not be moved or swapped. Every area a Zombie Avren appears. Its attacks increase the attack cooldown of Champions it hits. Zombie Avren can not be stopped. He ressurects after a brief period of time.

items.name: Free Play (Avren)
restrictions: Must have completed "The Trickster's Delight (Avren)"
No restrictions

items.name: Strike While It's Hot
restrictions: Must have completed "The Crypt of Legends (Sentry)"
Enemies take less damage the longer they're alive This does not apply to hits-based or armor-based enemies

items.name: Ride-Along
restrictions: Must have completed "The Crypt of Legends (Sentry)"

Sentry starts out in the formation and can not be moved or swapped out Two frightened villagers take up additional slots in the formation; they thought it would be exciting to do a patrol with the Champions... they thought wrong

items.name: Tempered Foes
restrictions: Must have completed "The Crypt of Legends (Sentry)"
Enemies that are damaged but not killed have their speed and damage increased and heal a portion of their missing health

items.name: Free Play (Sentry)
restrictions: Must have completed "The Crypt of Legends (Sentry)"
No restrictions

items.name: Spoiled Staples
restrictions: Must have completed "The Simril Spoilsport (Krull)"
Two barrel wagons take up slots in your formation

items.name: Master Plaguebringer
restrictions: Must have completed "The Simril Spoilsport (Krull)" Costs 625 Candles to start

Krull starts in your formation and can not be removed Non-Plagued enemies deal 100% more damage (additive) and move 10% faster (additive) for each enemy on the screen that doesn't have a Plague on them (including themselves)

items.name: The Creeping Chill
restrictions: Must have completed "The Simril Spoilsport (Krull)"
Every 5 areas, the temperature drops by 5 degrees. For each change in temperature, the enemies get stronger, increasing their health and damage by 100%.

items.name: Free Play (Krull)
restrictions: Must have completed "The Simril Spoilsport (Krull)"
No restrictions

items.name: The Infamous Assassin
restrictions: Must have completed "The Merry Map Misadventure (Artemis)"

Artemis begins in the formation and cannot be removed.
Champions (with the exception of Artemis) deal no damage, however Artemis's attack cooldown will complete when any DPS Champion attempts to attack.
Clicking does not deal damage during this adventure.

items.name: Designation: Hostile
restrictions: Must have completed "The Merry Map Misadventure (Artemis)"

Only Champions with Strength of 12 or higher can be used.
Armored Mechanical Guards spawn in each area and attempt to wrestle away the map. Each Mechanical Guard immediately picks a random champion and stuns them until the Mechanical Guard is killed.

items.name: Fan Club
restrictions: Must have completed "The Merry Map Misadventure (Artemis)"

A really excited costumed fan joins the formation.
Every 50 areas, another huge fan takes up another slot in the formation.

items.name: Free Play (Artemis)
restrictions: Must have completed "The Merry Map Misadventure (Artemis)"
No restrictions

items.name: Utterly Devoured
restrictions: Champions devoured by the Devourer are devoured forever and can not be used again until you reset.

items.name: Limited Resources
restrictions: Must have completed "Deadwinter Day (Môrgæn)"
Only Champions in the first bench seat are initially available. Every 10 areas another bench seat unlocks.

items.name: Careful Positioning
restrictions: Must have completed "Deadwinter Day (Môrgæn)"
Môrgæn starts in the formation and can not be removed or swapped out. Only Môrgæn and Champions buffed by Paid Up-Front can deal damage.

items.name: Free Play (Môrgæn)
restrictions: Must have completed "Deadwinter Day (Môrgæn)"
No restrictions

items.name: Odd Ones Out
restrictions: Must have completed "The Missing Merchants (Havilar)"

Havilar starts in the formation. She can be moved, but not removed.
Only every second bench slot can be used.
Farideh and Mehen can be used despite this restriction. They're odd, for sure, but they're family.

items.name: Diamonds Are Forever
restrictions: Must have completed "The Missing Merchants (Havilar)"
Diamond Golems attack the formation at random. They can not be damaged and must be tanked until the area is beaten.

items.name: Nightmare Scenario
restrictions: Must have completed "The Missing Merchants (Havilar)"

Havilar starts in the formation and can not be swapped, moved, or removed from the formation. Half of the enemies that spawn in non-boss areas are replaced with random demons that have more health and move more quickly than normal monsters.

items.name: Free Play (Havilar)
restrictions: Must have completed "The Missing Merchants (Havilar)"
No restrictions

items.name: Shattered Shields
restrictions: Must have completed "The Unfair Sea (Sisaspia)" Costs 250 Fresh Fishes to start

Umberlee's curse has broken all shields and heavy armor, rendering tanking Champions useless! The shattered remnants have been stolen by some fiendish creatures and co-opted for their own nefarious use. Champions with the tanking role can not be used. Random enemies spawn with 5 armored hit points.

items.name: The Suspicious Shipment
restrictions: Must have completed "The Unfair Sea (Sisaspia)" Costs 625 Fresh Fishes to start
A strange shipment takes up a slot in the formation. It's so distracting that Champions adjacent to the shipment deal no damage.

items.name: Seas of Sickness
restrictions: Must have completed "The Unfair Sea (Sisaspia)" Costs 1250 Fresh Fishes to start
Sisaspia starts out in the formation and can not be moved, removed, or swapped. Enemies move faster and deal more damage unless they are affected by Sisaspia's spores.

items.name: Free Play (Sisaspia)
restrictions: Must have completed "The Unfair Sea (Sisaspia)" Costs up to 2500 Fresh Fishes to start
No restrictions

items.name: A Little Perspective
restrictions: Must have completed "A Fool's Errand (Briv)" Costs 250 Pennants to start

Pixies spawn at random in all non-boss areas. When a Pixie spawns, it shrinks a random Champion by 33%, decreasing their damage done by 99%. This effect persists until the Pixie causing it is killed. This effect can stack if multiple Pixies target the same Champion.

items.name: Nerves of Steel
restrictions: Must have completed "A Fool's Errand (Briv)" Costs 625 Pennants to start
Briv starts in the formation and can not be moved, removed, or swapped out. Normal enemies move 10x faster and attack 3x faster; bosses are unaffected.

items.name: A Delicious Diversion
restrictions: Must have completed "A Fool's Errand (Briv)" Costs 1250 Pennants to start

A cart of tasty pies, baguettes, and other baked snacks takes up slots in the formation; the cart has 100 hit points. Ravenous Crows and Famished Rats spawn randomly in each area. These additional creatures have 4 points of armored health. If, for whatever reason, the cart is smashed, you immediately lose the area and go back to the previous area.

items.name: Free Play (Briv)
restrictions: Must have completed "A Fool's Errand (Briv)" Costs up to 2500 Pennants to start
No restrictions

items.name: Honorable Discharge
restrictions: Must have completed "The Endless War (Melf)" Costs 250 Bouquets to start

Each Champion can only be used to beat 50 unique areas A Champion counts as being "used" in an area if they're in the formation at any time during the attempt that beats an area for the first time After a Champion has been used while beating 50 unique areas, they can not be used in the formation anymore

items.name: The Problem Solvers
restrictions: Must have completed "The Endless War (Melf)" Costs 625 Bouquets to start
Only Champions with Intelligence of 13 or higher can be used

items.name: Wheat From The Chaff
restrictions: Must have completed "The Endless War (Melf)" Costs 1250 Bouquets to start
Melf starts out in the formation with Melf's Righteous Determination unlocked. Melf can not be removed from the formation or swapped out. Only enemies Melf deems to be Evil can be damaged.

items.name: Free Play (Melf)
restrictions: Must have completed "The Endless War (Melf)" Costs up to 2500 Bouquets to start
No restrictions

items.name: Split Up
restrictions: Must have completed "The Grandfather Acorn (Krydle)" Costs 250 Leaves to start
A Champion can not be placed adjacent to any other Champion

items.name: The Early Bird Gets The Acorn
restrictions: Must have completed "The Grandfather Acorn (Krydle)" Costs 625 Leaves to start
Only Champions in seats 1-7 can be used

items.name: Krydle's Posse
restrictions: Must have completed "The Grandfather Acorn (Krydle)" Costs 1250 Leaves to start
Krydle starts out in the formation and can not be moved, removed, or swapped out Only Champions with a CHA score of 15+ can be used

items.name: Free Play (Krydle)
restrictions: Must have completed "The Grandfather Acorn (Krydle)" Costs up to 2500 Leaves to start
No restrictions

items.name: An Unkindness of Ravens
restrictions: Must have completed "The Mechanical Menace (Jaheira)" Costs 250 Rusted Gears to start
Jaheira starts in your formation in slot 3. She can't be moved. Ravens appear in each area. Whenever any raven dies, 1-2 more spawn. Ravens do not drop gold, nor do they count towards quest progress.

items.name: The Backwards Modron
restrictions: Must have completed "The Mechanical Menace (Jaheira)" Costs 625 Rusted Gears to start

Nordom joins the cause! He takes up slot 5 in your formation and is intent on helping Waterdeep with his lightning crossbow bolts. Instead of stunning the constructs, Nordom's lightning bolt accidentally empowers them! He attacks every 4 seconds and targets the furthest enemy. Any construct that is hit by Nordom's bolt increases its speed by 4x and increases its attack damage by 400% until it is destroyed.

items.name: Chickens in the Deep
restrictions: Must have completed "The Mechanical Menace (Jaheira)" Costs 1250 Rusted Gears to start

In each area, a 3 armored HP Abyssal Chicken spawns after 10 enemies. Abyssal Chickens drop no gold and do not count towards quest progress. After every 10 areas, the number of Abyssal Chickens that spawn is increased by 1. The number of Abyssal Chickens spawned caps at 50.

items.name: Free Play (Jaheira)
restrictions: Must have completed "The Mechanical Menace (Jaheira)" Costs up to 2500 Rusted Gears to start
No restrictions

items.name: Failed Perception
restrictions: Must have completed "Let Sleeping Dragons Lie (Nova)" Costs 250 Dragon Claws to start

Only Champions with WIS 14 or lower can be used. Whenever an enemy spawns, there is a 25% chance that it will be an illusory enemy, and won't count towards quest progress or drop gold. When an illusory enemy is killed with a normal attack, the Champion that killed the enemy is stunned for 10 seconds.

items.name: Tranced Travellers
restrictions: Must have completed "Let Sleeping Dragons Lie (Nova)" Costs 625 Dragon Claws to start

Two of the slots in your formation are affected by a magical spell that's causing folks around Luskan to start snoring! The affected slots change every 15 seconds by moving to a random adjacent slot. Champions in affected slots must concentrate on not falling asleep, so they do not attack and Ultimates are disabled.

items.name: Dolgrim Incursion
restrictions: Must have completed "Let Sleeping Dragons Lie (Nova)" Costs 1250 Dragon Claws to start

Only Champions with INT 14 or higher can be used. Nova begins in the formation and can't be moved. Dolgrims appear at a rate of 2 per wave. They drop no gold and do not count towards quest progress. Dolgrims movement speed is doubled and their damage is increased by 400%.

items.name: Free Play (Nova)
restrictions: Must have completed "Let Sleeping Dragons Lie (Nova)" Costs up to 2500 Dragon Claws to start
No restrictions

items.name: Team Smrt Defense Team
restrictions: Must have completed "Party Crashers (Freely)"
Only Champions with INT 12 or lower can be used.

items.name: Invasion Nation
restrictions: Must have completed "Party Crashers (Freely)"
Whenever a demon or fiend spawns normally, two additional copies of that creature spawn. These additional creatures move twice as fast as normal, but don't drop gold or credit quest progress.

items.name: Live Free
restrictions: Must have completed "Party Crashers (Freely)"

Freely starts out in the formation with Luck of Yondalla unlocked and can not be moved or removed. Champions placed adjacent to Freely automatically get Luck of Yondalla. Only enemies who are affected by at least one Lucky Break can be damaged.

items.name: Free Play (Freely)
restrictions: Must have completed "Party Crashers (Freely)"
No restrictions

items.name: Arvaiss' Next Trap
restrictions: Must have completed "The Missing Lord (Beadle)"

Beadle starts in the formation. He can be moved, but not removed.
Only Champions within 2 slots of Beadle can deal damage.
Various creatures attack your formation, each with different abilities. See the buff icon for details.
Getting to Know Beadle: Beadle's In The Shadows ability buffs the damage of Champions within two slots of him.

items.name: Showoffs
restrictions: Must have completed "The Missing Lord (Beadle)"

Beadle takes up a slot in your formation. Only Champions with DEX of 14 or higher can be used.
Getting to Know Beadle (& Grimm!): While Grimm wouldn't normally be eligible for this adventure due to his low Dexterity, he can still be added to the formation due to the two of them being Inseparable.

items.name: The Best Treasure
restrictions: Must have completed "The Missing Lord (Beadle)"

Beadle starts in the formation. He can be moved, but not removed.
Other than Beadle & Grimm, you may only use Champions that have at least one piece of Epic rarity, Shiny, or Golden equipment.
Enemies have 300% more health and attack twice as often.
Getting to know Beadle: Beadle's specialization choice improves his buffs based on the gear your Champions have. Choose the best specialization for your formation!

items.name: Free Play (Beadle)
restrictions: Must have completed "The Missing Lord (Beadle)"
No restrictions

items.name: Lords of Waterdeep
restrictions: Must have completed "Reclaiming the Past (Omin)"

- A masked lord takes up a slot in your formation. Others join the formation periodically until area 601. 
 Starting in area 601, the lords provide a global damage buff to your formation that starts at 20% and increases by 20% (multiplicatively) in each additional area.

items.name: Vajra's Command
restrictions: Must have completed "Reclaiming the Past (Omin)"
Only Champions with a CON score of 14 or higher, or an associate of Omin, can be used. Associates of Omin include Champions with the Acquisition Incorporated or "C" Team affiliation.

items.name: Fortune Favors the Bold
restrictions: Must have completed "Reclaiming the Past (Omin)"

Omin begins in the formation and can not be moved or removed. Whenever a Champion kills a non-boss enemy, the base attack cooldown of Champions adjacent to them is reduced for their next attack. Whenever a Champion attacks but does not kill a non-boss enemy, that enemy moves faster and deals more damage. This effect can stack.

items.name: Free Play (Omin)

Lazaapz starts in the formation. She cannot be moved, removed, or swapped. All enemies have their damage and movement speed increased by 100% for each Ogre Battering Ram on screen (additive). Champions in the two columns behind Lazaapz become part of her posse. Everyone's smaller than an ogre, right?

items.name: Free Play
