items.name: Extreme Heat
restrictions: Must have completed "Bel's Forge"

Bel's Forge was built into an active volcano. As such, the formation is taking a bit of heat while adventuring. Every 3 seconds, each Champion takes 10% of their max health as damage. Whenever a Champion's health is below 50% of their max health, their damage is reduced by 99%.

items.name: Fire and Brimstone
restrictions:
Must have completed "Bel's Forge"
Must have completed 41 Descent into Avernus adventures or variants

In each non-boss area, one Lesser Fire Elemental appears with each wave. They do not count towards quest progress, nor do they drop gold. The Elemental's movement is 300% faster. If the Elemental hits with an attack, it explodes and all champions lose 20% of their max HP. In each boss area a Cultist of Zariel appears. You must defeat this additional boss to advance. Only champions with STR of 10 or higher and CHA of 13 or higher can be used.

items.name: Flames of Avernus
restrictions:
Must have completed "Bel's Forge"
Must have completed 56 Descent into Avernus adventures or variants

Every 10 seconds, a random formation slot catches fire for 10 seconds, dealing damage to any Champion occupying it equal to 10% of their max health every second.
You may not use Cleric Champions.

items.name: Free Play
restrictions: Must have completed "Bel's Forge"
No restrictions

items.name: A Tenday at Golgamann's
items.campaign: A Grand Tour of the Sword Coast
restrictions: Must have completed "Into the Unknown"

Golgamann has some friends over to visit and they do not approve of the Champions! Only Champions with a WIS score of 11 or lower can be used. Skeletons spawn randomly with each enemy wave. These extra skeleton enemies deal 300% more damage, do not drop gold, and do not count towards quests.

items.name: A Nightmare Occasion
items.campaign: A Grand Tour of the Sword Coast
restrictions: Must have completed "Into the Unknown" Must have completed 49 Grand Tour adventures or variants

Rudolph van Richten and his ally Ireena Kolyana accompany the Champions taking up slots in the formation. Every area, Barovian Wedding Guests arrive. These enemies don't count toward quest progress, nor do they drop any gold. They are intent on recapturing Ireena for their master.

items.name: Mental Gymnastics
items.campaign: A Grand Tour of the Sword Coast
restrictions:
Must have completed "Into the Unknown"
Must have completed 98 Grand Tour adventures or variants

You may only use Champions with an Intelligence of 11 or less.
1-2 mind flayers spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold or count towards quest progress.

items.name: Free Play
items.campaign: A Grand Tour of the Sword Coast
restrictions: Must have completed "Into the Unknown"
No restrictions

items.name: Prisoners of Lolth
items.campaign: A Grand Tour of the Sword Coast
restrictions: Must have completed "The Prison of Velkynvelve"

All Drow enemies are blessed by Lolth, granting them an initial set of armored hit points that must be cleared before their health can be damaged Only Champions with a STR score of 15 or higher can be used

items.name: Prisoners of Unknown Choices
items.campaign: A Grand Tour of the Sword Coast
restrictions: Must have completed "The Prison of Velkynvelve" Must have complete 35 Grand Tour adventures or variants

Two of the slots in your formation are cursed due to the choices made by some massively powerful unseen force! The cursed slots change every 15 seconds by moving to a random adjacent slot. Champions in cursed slots can not attack and all their upgrades are disabled.

items.name: Free Play
items.campaign: A Grand Tour of the Sword Coast
restrictions: Must have completed "The Prison of Velkynvelve"
No restrictions

items.name: Rime Bandits
items.campaign: Icewind Dale: Rime of the Frostmaiden
restrictions: Must have completed "The Giant's Bane Tavern"

Arctic Bandits appear in each area. They do not drop gold or count for quest progress. Enemies drop 99% less gold. When an Arctic Bandit enemy damages a Champion, the Champion is stunned for 2 seconds.

items.name: Giant-Size Adventure
items.campaign: Icewind Dale: Rime of the Frostmaiden
restrictions:
Must have completed "The Giant's Bane Tavern"
Must have completed 4 Icewind Dale: Rime of the Frostmaiden adventures or variants

The great writer Volothamp Geddarm accompanies the Champions taking up a slot in the formation and debuffing the damage of everyone adjacent. Non-giant creatures are scaled up, creating the sort of harrowing tale that Volo is famous for. Enemies move 100% faster and deal 200% more damage.

items.name: Power of Three
items.campaign: Icewind Dale: Rime of the Frostmaiden
restrictions:
Must have completed "The Giant's Bane Tavern"
Must have completed 13 Icewind Dale: Rime of the Frostmaiden adventures or variants
Only Event Champions from Year Three can be used.

items.name: Free Play
items.campaign: Icewind Dale: Rime of the Frostmaiden
restrictions: Must have completed "The Giant's Bane Tavern"
No restrictions

items.name: Enemy Summit
items.campaign: Icewind Dale: Rime of the Frostmaiden
restrictions: Must have completed "The Everlasting Rime"
Unique enemies from the previous four campaigns appear in each area. These unique enemies each have special abilities that stay active until they are defeated.

items.name: Mirage Arcane
items.campaign: Icewind Dale: Rime of the Frostmaiden
restrictions:
Must have completed "The Everlasting Rime"
Must have complete 5 Icewind Dale: Rime of the Frostmaiden adventures or variants

In an effort to help the Champions weather the cold, Chadwick joins them and attempts to practice with some new spell scrolls. The terrain around the Champions changes, and not always to the Champions' advantage. This adventure has unique dialogue.

items.name: Only Human
items.campaign: Icewind Dale: Rime of the Frostmaiden
restrictions:
Must have completed "The Everlasting Rime"
Must have complete 14 Icewind Dale: Rime of the Frostmaiden adventures or variants

A random Human Champion is immediately unlocked, added to the formation, and can't be removed. Other Human Champions cannot be used. In each area, enemies move 2% faster and deal 4% more damage, stacking additively.

items.name: Free Play
items.campaign: Icewind Dale: Rime of the Frostmaiden
restrictions: Must have completed "The Everlasting Rime"
No restrictions

items.name: An Abyssal Mess
restrictions: Must have completed "The Bandit's Harvest (Torogar)"

-Two abyssal chickens start in slots in the formation.
- Additional Chickens join in the following areas:
	- Area 51: Slot 5
	- Area 151: Slot 6
	- Area 351: Slot 7

items.name: CONfirmed Sightings
restrictions: Must have completed "The Bandit's Harvest (Torogar)"
Only Champions with a CON score of 14 or higher can be used. The Resurrected Hero of the Vale appears in area 25 as an additional boss.

items.name: The Dark Order Arrives
restrictions: Must have completed "The Bandit's Harvest (Torogar)"

Torogar and Arkhan start in the formation and can not be moved or swapped out. Only members of The Dark Order (Torogar, Arkhan, and Krull) can deal damage. All other Champions have their DPS disabled, but can still contribute formation abilities.

items.name: Free Play (Torogar)
restrictions: Must have completed "The Bandit's Harvest (Torogar)"
No restrictions

items.name: The Devil's Scourge
restrictions: Must have completed "The Trickster's Delight (Ezmerelda)"

Strahd von Zarovich sent his Zombies to follow Ezmerelda from Barovia. Strahd Zombies appear in each wave. These Zombies deal 100% additional damage, do not drop gold, and do not count towards quest progress.

items.name: The Devil Knocks
restrictions: Must have completed "The Trickster's Delight (Ezmerelda)"
The mists of Ravenloft encroach upon us, making it harder for the Champions to see. Enemies move 100% faster and drop 99% less gold.

items.name: The Devil You Know
restrictions: Must have completed "The Trickster's Delight (Ezmerelda)"

Ezmerelda starts in the formation and can't move. Only Champions in Ezmerelda's column can deal damage. All other Champions have their DPS disabled, but their formation abilities are active. Vampire Spawn appear in each wave. They deal 100% additional damage. They do not drop gold, nor do they count towards quest progress. This adventure has unique dialogue.

items.name: Free Play (Ezmerelda)
restrictions: Must have completed "The Trickster's Delight (Ezmerelda)"
No restrictions

items.name: Half-Empty Crypts
restrictions: Must have completed "The Crypt of Legends (Penelope)"
Grave Robbers spawn in each area While any Grave Robber remains alive, undead creatures move faster and deal more damage

items.name: Half-Full Outlook
restrictions: Must have completed "The Crypt of Legends (Penelope)"

Awakened Cleaning Supplies spawn with each wave These magical cleaning supplies deal more damage and have hits-based health. Penelope can one-shot the cleaning supplies, and thus starts in the formation to help out (she can't be removed)

items.name: Half-Pint Friends
restrictions: Must have completed "The Crypt of Legends (Penelope)"
Penelope starts in the formation and can not be moved or removed. Penelope attacks a bit faster because she's very excited to make new friends. Only Good Champions can be used.

items.name: Free Play (Penelope)
restrictions: Must have completed "The Crypt of Legends (Penelope)"
No restrictions

items.name: No Rest for the Gifted
restrictions: Must have completed "The Simril Spoilsport (Lucius)"
Only Champions with a CHA score of 14 or higher can be used. Quest goals are doubled.

items.name: Udderly Deadly
restrictions: Must have completed "The Simril Spoilsport (Lucius)"

Lucius starts in the formation (slot 5) and cannot be moved. Lucius is the only Champion that can deal damage. All other Champions have their DPS disabled, but their formation abilities are active. Lucius' attacks twice as fast as normal and his Ultimate cooldown is reduced to 30 seconds. In each area, a cursed cow appears; if the cursed cow attacks a Champion, that Champion becomes cursed, disabling all of its upgrades until you change areas.

items.name: Lucius' Bedtime Stories
restrictions: Must have completed "The Simril Spoilsport (Lucius)"

Nat, Jenks, and Squiddly join the Champions for their first Simril outside of Waterdeep! They each take up a slot in the formation. Lesser Gibbering Mouthers appear in each area, and move 100% faster (as nightmares do).

items.name: Free Play (Lucius)
restrictions: Must have completed "The Simril Spoilsport (Lucius)"
No restrictions

items.name: Watchful Eyes
restrictions: Must have completed "The Merry Map Misadventure (Baeloth)"
Only Champions with INT and WIS of 11 or higher can be used Baeloth starts in the formation but he can be moved or benched.

items.name: Rat Problems
restrictions: Must have completed "The Merry Map Misadventure (Baeloth)"

The streets of waterdeep have been overrun by deadly giant rats from avernus! All beast enemies in the adventure have been replaced by Abyssal Rats throughout the adventure. Additional Abyssal Rats spawn in each area. Abyssal Rats start out by dealing 100% additional damage, but each time an Abyssal Rat attacks a Champion, the damage of all enemies increases by 10%.

items.name: The More the Merrier!
restrictions: Must have completed "The Merry Map Misadventure (Baeloth)"

Baeloth starts in the formation and cannot be moved. An Ogre, a Shambling Mound and a Fire Elemental appear in each area. While they are alive, they each grant a unique buff to the enemies. - Ogre: Enemies can only be damaged by Champions with Magical or Ranged base attacks. - Shambling Mound: Enemies deal 100% additional damage. - Fire Elemental: Enemies move 100% faster. This adventure contains unique dialogue.

items.name: Free Play (Baeloth)
restrictions: Must have completed "The Merry Map Misadventure (Baeloth)"
No restrictions

items.name: Fiendish Friends
restrictions: Must have completed "Deadwinter Day (Talin)"

A collection of fiends spawn in each area. While they are alive, the fiends bestow the following buffs to other enemies. - Imp: Enemies drop 99% less gold. - Dretch: Enemies deal 100% additional damage. - Abyssal Chicken: Enemies move 100% faster. Charge!

items.name: Once Upon a Gazer
restrictions: Must have completed "Deadwinter Day (Talin)"
Only Champions with WIS 13 or higher can be used. Gazers spawn in each area. They do not drop gold, nor do they count towards quest progress. Champions hit by a gazer are stunned for 3 seconds.

items.name: Deadwinter Dodge
restrictions: Must have completed "Deadwinter Day (Talin)"
Talin starts in the formation and can't be moved or removed Only Champions with DEX 14 or higher AND INT 12 or higher can be used.

items.name: Free Play (Talin)
restrictions: Must have completed "Deadwinter Day (Talin)"
No restrictions

items.name: Kobolds in Trench Coats!
restrictions: Must have completed "The Missing Merchants (Hew Maan)"

Hew Maan starts in the front row of the formation. They can't be moved or removed. Two of Hew Maan's "Human" friends have also joined the formation to see them in action! Quest requirements are doubled in non-boss areas Getting to know Zrang - Because of their location in the formation, Zrang is on top of Hew Maan, meaning that enemies have a 25% chance to count double for quest progress (Teamwork). Kleeb and Yassa are not on top, which means that hits-based and armor-based enemies and blockers have a 50% chance of spawning with 25% of their hits already gone, and the base attack cooldown of Champions adjacent to Hew Maan are reduced by .5 seconds (Please Stand By)!

items.name: More Dead Than Hew Maan
restrictions: Must have completed "The Missing Merchants (Hew Maan)"

Hew Maan starts in one of the middle rows of the formation (slot 5). They can't be moved or removed. Relentless Undead monsters spawn and attack your formation. When they are killed, they don't disappear. Instead, after 5 seconds, they get back up and resume their relentless attack. Getting to know Kleeb - Because of their location in the formation, Kleeb is on top of Hew Maan, meaning that Champion damage against bosses is increased and if that boss has hits-based or armor-based health, successful attacks destroy twice as many segments as they normally would (Teamwork). Yassa and Zrang are not on top, which means that boss enemies move 25% slower, and the base attack cooldown of Champions adjacent to Hew Maan are reduced by .5 seconds (Please Stand By)!

items.name: Hit 'em fast, Hit 'em hard
restrictions: Must have completed "The Missing Merchants (Hew Maan)"

Hew Maan starts in the back row of the formation. They can't be moved or removed. Armored abyssal chickens spawn in each area. These chickens drop no gold, nor do they count towards quest progress. Every 10 areas an additional Armored Abyssal Chicken spawns and attacks. Getting to know Yassa - Because of their location in the formation, Yassa is on top of Hew Maan, meaning that Champion damage is increased in the two columns in front of Hew Maan (Teamwork). Kleeb and Zrang are not on top, which means that hits-based and armor-based enemies and blockers have a 50% chance of spawning with 25% of their hits already gone, and bosses move 25% slower (Please Stand By)!

items.name: Free Play (Hew Maan)
restrictions: Must have completed "The Missing Merchants (Hew Maan)"
No restrictions

items.name: Umberlee's Abyssal Adventure
restrictions: Must have completed "The Unfair Sea (Orisha)" Costs 250 Fresh Fishes to start
Abyssal crabs appear in each area. They do not drop gold, nor do they count towards quest progress. Enemies deal 200% additional damage. Only Champions with the Support tag can be used.

items.name: Volo's Guide to Umberlee
restrictions: Must have completed "The Unfair Sea (Orisha)" Costs 625 Fresh Fishes to start
Volo joins the formation. Only Champions adjacent to Volo deal damage. Champions not adjacent to Volo deal no damage, but their formation abilities are still active.

items.name: Sirens Sound Check
restrictions: Must have completed "The Unfair Sea (Orisha)" Costs 1250 Fresh Fishes to start

A collection of bards that were rejected at the last Sirens of the Realms audition are back for revenge! Each area, 3 bards appear. Each of them has a unique effect that is active while they are alive - Duergar - Enemies deal 300% additional damage. - Elf - Enemies move 200% faster. -Goblin - Champions normal attack cooldown is increased by 0.5 seconds. Non-Bard Champions have their damage reduced by 99%.

items.name: Free Play (Orisha)
restrictions: Must have completed "The Unfair Sea (Orisha)" Costs up to 2500 Fresh Fishes to start
No restrictions

items.name: Future Sight
restrictions: Must have completed "A Fool's Errand (Alyndra)" Costs 250 Pennants to start

In each boss area, you will encounter the current boss AND the next boss at once. You'll need to defeat both to progress. Chadwick joins the formation. He mostly observes and tries to figure out what's going on.

items.name: Frost Wave
restrictions: Must have completed "A Fool's Errand (Alyndra)" Costs 625 Pennants to start

Additional Frost Giants appear in each area. Each of these additional Frost Giants start with 4 hits-based hit points. Every 25 areas they gain 4 additional hits-based hit points. Champion damage is reduced by 99%.

items.name: Knowledge Over Power
restrictions: Must have completed "A Fool's Errand (Alyndra)" Costs 1250 Pennants to start
Only Champions with INT of 14 or higher can be used. Alyndra starts in your formation. She can be moved or removed.

items.name: Free Play (Alyndra)
restrictions: Must have completed "A Fool's Errand (Alyndra)" Costs up to 2500 Pennants to start
No restrictions

items.name: Wise Warriors Wait
restrictions: Must have completed "The Endless War (Orkira)" Costs 250 Bouquets to start
Only Champions with a WIS score of 13 or higher can be used. Enemies move 100% faster. Every 25 areas, that speed boost is increased by 100% (additively).

items.name: Volo's Guide to Orkira
restrictions: Must have completed "The Endless War (Orkira)" Costs 625 Bouquets to start

Orkira starts in the formation and can't be moved or removed. Volo joins the formation and catalogs Orkira's unique capabilities. Volo forgot to mention that he angered a swarm of Spined devils before joining us. They appear in each area and deal 300% additional damage.

items.name: Flayer Whispers
restrictions: Must have completed "The Endless War (Orkira)" Costs 1250 Bouquets to start

Armored Mind Flayer Guards appear in each area. The Elder Brain's whispers slowly drive your Champions mad When a Champion gets a killing blow, they gain a random number of stacks of a debuff When the debuff reaches 100 stacks, they are stunned for 15 seconds Mind Flayers and the Elder Brain all deal 100% additional damage.

items.name: Free Play (Orkira)
restrictions: Must have completed "The Endless War (Orkira)" Costs up to 2500 Bouquets to start
No restrictions

items.name: The Web Was On The Wall
restrictions: Must have completed "The Grandfather Acorn (Shaka)"
Giant Spiders appear in each area. Whenever a Champion destroys a Giant Spider, they become webbed (stunned) for 3 seconds. Gold Find reduced by 99%.

items.name: Shaka's Puzzle
restrictions: Must have completed "The Grandfather Acorn (Shaka)"

Shaka starts in the formation (slot 6). He can be moved. Only Shaka and the Champions who match the tag for their slot from Shaka's A Celestial Puzzle ability can deal damage; Shaka's A Celestial Puzzle starts out unlocked. Getting to know Shaka: Shaka's main ability is A Celestial Puzzle. It will tag 4 random slots with a specific tag. When you solve the puzzle and place a Champion that matches the tag, A Celestial Puzzle buffs the damage of the entire party by a massive amount. Match all the tags to give your party the biggest boost!

items.name: Lolth's Blessing
restrictions: Must have completed "The Grandfather Acorn (Shaka)"
A Drow Wizard spawns in each area with the Blessing of Lolth. While the Drow Wizard is alive, all Drow enemies deal 300% additional damage and move 100% faster.

items.name: Free Play (Shaka)
restrictions: Must have completed "The Grandfather Acorn (Shaka)"
No restrictions

items.name: The Elusive Bounty
restrictions: Must have completed "The Mechanical Menace (Mehen)" Costs 250 Rusted Gears to start

Mehen starts in the formation. He can not be moved or removed. The pixie arrives in each boss area to taunt Mehen, buffing all enemies so they move 100% faster and deal 100% additional damage. You must defeat her in addition to the area requirements to advance. 
Getting to know Mehen: To maximize Mehen's contribution, try to build a formation that meets as many of his Grumpy checks as possible. Note that empty slots in the formation do not count as adjacent spaces, and therefore can't be skipped across for the "within 2 slots" checks.

items.name: The Neverending March Continues
restrictions: Must have completed "The Mechanical Menace (Mehen)" Costs 625 Rusted Gears to start
Every time a Modron is killed in non-boss areas it shuts down for 5 seconds and then comes back to life with full health. Modron enemies deal 100% additional damage.

items.name: Volo's Guide to Grumpy Guys
restrictions: Must have completed "The Mechanical Menace (Mehen)" Costs 1250 Rusted Gears to start

Volo has returned to observe the formation. 
Mehen starts in the formation. He can be moved but not removed.
Only Male and non-binary Champions can be used. 
Enemies move 100% faster, and deal 100% additional damage. 
Getting to know Mehen: Despite the variant restriction that you may only use Male Champions, Mehen can still rely on his adopted daughters Farideh and Havilar to show up due to his passive ability.

items.name: Free Play (Mehen)
restrictions: Must have completed "The Mechanical Menace (Mehen)" Costs up to 2500 Rusted Gears to start
No restrictions

items.name: Stalwart Supporters
restrictions: Must have completed "Let Sleeping Dragons Lie (Selise)"

Selise starts in the formation. She can be moved or removed. Only Champions with STR of 13 or higher can be used. Getting to know Selise: Each time you trigger her ultimate attack, she switches shield stances. Each shield stance (Aggressive, Wall, and Last Resort) changes the way her normal attack works, and also how Divine Sense buffs Champions in the two columns behind her.

items.name: Tears of Tyr
restrictions: Must have completed "Let Sleeping Dragons Lie (Selise)"

Selise starts in the formation. She can be moved or removed. While in outdoor areas, rain falls, increasing the speed and attack damage of enemies by 100%. Champions' base attack cooldowns are increased by 1 second. Only Champions with a WIS of 13 or higher can be used. Getting to know Selise: Keep Selise in her Aggressive shield stance to keep Champions attacking as quickly as possible!

items.name: The Endless Claws
restrictions: Must have completed "Let Sleeping Dragons Lie (Selise)"

Selise starts in the formation. She can be moved or removed. Crawling Claws appear in each area. They deal 200% additional damage. When a Crawling Claw is destroyed by anyone other than Selise Astorio, it immediately respawns and continues its attack! Crawling Claws do not count towards quest progress, nor do they drop any gold. Getting to know Selise: Her Last Resort shield stance is optimal for this variant, as it has a small AOE. Using her ultimate to switch between Last Resort and Aggressive shield stances will trigger Thunderous Smite, allowing her to attack even more enemies and clear the field of Crawling Claws!

items.name: Free Play (Selise)
restrictions: Must have completed "Let Sleeping Dragons Lie (Selise)"
No restrictions

items.name: Neverwinter Defenders
restrictions: Must have completed "Party Crashers (Sergeant Knox)"

Sergeant Knox starts in the formation. He cannot be moved or removed. 
The damage of all Champions is increased by 50% if Celeste is in the formation, and an additional 50% if Makos is in the formation.
Enemy damage & Speed is increased by 100%. 
Getting to know Sergeant Knox: Knox works best with his fellow Neverwinter Allies Celeste & Makos in the formation.

items.name: Afterparty
restrictions: Must have completed "Party Crashers (Sergeant Knox)"

A pair of Bearded Devils join the formation. They're just here for the souvenirs.  
Quest goals are doubled.

items.name: Blast from the Past
restrictions: Must have completed "Party Crashers (Sergeant Knox)"

Only Champions with INT of 12 or higher can be used. 
Sergeant Knox starts in the formation. He cannot be moved or removed. 
Each area, zombies aligned with Valindra attack. They do not drop gold, nor do they count towards quest progress.
Valindra Shadowmantle replaces Zariel in area 50.

items.name: Free Play (Sergeant Knox)
restrictions: Must have completed "Party Crashers (Sergeant Knox)"
No restrictions

items.name: Pixie Trickery
restrictions: Must have completed "The Missing Lord (Ellywick)"

A slot is taken up in the formation by a Pixie riding an intellect devourer, who is along to watch Ellywick do her thing. 
Each time a boss arrives on screen, all Champions are stunned for 5 seconds. If Ellywick is in the formation, the stun does not take effect.

items.name: Fey Harmonies
restrictions: Must have completed "The Missing Lord (Ellywick)"

Ellywick starts in your formation. She can be moved. 
Every area, 2 Satyrs arrive to harmonize . While any Satyrs are on screen, all enemies can only be damaged by bards.
Only Champions with CHA 14 or higher can be used.

items.name: Draconic Dissonance
restrictions: Must have completed "The Missing Lord (Ellywick)"

Every area, 5 random chromatic Dragon Wyrmlings spawn with the second wave. Each type of Dragon buffs the Dragons on screen in a unique way. Buffs combine additively if multiples of the same dragon are spawned. 
- White - When a Dragon attacks, it heals 20% of its health.
- Blue - Increase the normal attack cooldown of Champions by 0.5 seconds.
- Black - When a non-boss Dragon dies, there's a 25% chance that it immediately respawns. 
- Red - Dragons move 100% faster.
- Green - Dragons deal 100% additional damage. 
If Ellywick is in the formation, one fewer Wyrmling spawns in each area.

items.name: Free Play (Ellywick)
restrictions: Must have completed "The Missing Lord (Ellywick)"
No restrictions

items.name: Spider Climb
restrictions: Must have completed "Reclaiming the Past (Prudence)"

Giant Wolf Spiders arrive in each area. These spiders drop no gold, nor do they count towards quest progress. 
Each time a spider is killed, a random Champion is stunned for 2 seconds. 
Only Champions with DEX of 12 or higher can be used.

items.name: Gleefully Evil
restrictions: Must have completed "Reclaiming the Past (Prudence)"

Only Evil Champions can deal damage. Prudence starts in your formation and her base attack cooldown is reduced by 2 seconds.

Getting to know Prudence - Prudence finds it fun to kill enemies in front of her more squeamish good-aligned allies. Add good-aligned champions to power up her Glee stacks. If she maxes her stacks of Glee consistently, consider adding a non-good champion to give her someone who gets her jokes, increasing her max stacks and super-charging her power level!

items.name: Pure Hunger
restrictions: Must have completed "Reclaiming the Past (Prudence)"

A tentacle accompanies the formation. No one knows what it's doing, but it's freaking most of us out. 
Enemies move 100% faster and deal 100% additional damage. Every 25 areas, all enemies' speed and damage is increased by an additional 35% (additive). 
Whenever Prudence kills an enemy, stun all enemies for 0.5 seconds.

items.name: Free Play (Prudence)
restrictions: Must have completed "Reclaiming the Past (Prudence)"
No restrictions

items.name: A Pirate's Curse
restrictions: Must have completed "Brightly into Darkness (Corazón)"

Corazón starts in the formation and can't be moved or removed.  Every area cursed pirate ghosts appear. When a cursed pirate ghost attacks a Champion, they are stunned for 1 second. Only Corazón can deal damage to the cursed pirate ghosts, and he prioritizes attacking them over anything else.

items.name: Grease the Wheels
restrictions: Must have completed "Brightly into Darkness (Corazón)"

In every boss area an orc war wagon appears to hamper the Champions' progress. The war wagon must also be defeated in order to progress. The effects of Corazón's Grease ability are doubled against the War Wagon. Getting to know Corazón: Not only does Grease slow enemies, but if you time Corazón's ultimate correctly, you can unleash a massive firestorm, burning the enemies as they slip and slide through the grease puddles!

items.name: Haunted by the Past
restrictions: Must have completed "Brightly into Darkness (Corazón)"

Corazón starts in the formation and can't be moved or removed. Two cursed pirate ghosts join the formation, watching and judging Corazón. Every 25 areas they change positions. Cursed pirate ghosts increase the base attack cooldown of adjacent Champions by 1 second. Neutral Champions (on the good/evil spectrum), deal 100% additional damage.

items.name: Free Play (Corazón)
restrictions: Must have completed "Brightly into Darkness (Corazón)"
No restrictions

items.name: An Awakened Axe
items.campaign: Icewind Dale: Rime of the Frostmaiden
restrictions: Must have completed "Moose Tracks"
The Awakened Axe Beak arrives in each area with 5 armored hit points. The Awakened Axe Beak deals damage equal to 50% of your Champions' max health.

items.name: CONtagious Cold
items.campaign: Icewind Dale: Rime of the Frostmaiden
restrictions: Must have completed "Moose Tracks" Must have complete 10 Icewind Dale: Rime of the Frostmaiden adventures or variants

Rudolph van Richten accompanies the Champions taking up a slot in the formation. Frozen Twig Blights appear in each area and attempt to stop the Champions. They don't drop gold, nor do they count towards quest progress. Whenever a Frozen Twig Blight attacks a Champion, the entire formation is stunned for 1 second. Only Champions with CON 14 or higher can be used.

items.name: Ten in Ten-Towns
items.campaign: Icewind Dale: Rime of the Frostmaiden
restrictions: Must have completed "Moose Tracks" Must have complete 19 Icewind Dale: Rime of the Frostmaiden adventures or variants

A random Champion from seat 10 is immediately unlocked, added to the formation, can't be removed, but can be moved.
Champions from the first two bench seats cannot be used.

items.name: Free Play
items.campaign: Icewind Dale: Rime of the Frostmaiden
restrictions: Must have completed "Moose Tracks"
No restrictions

items.name: Trench Coat Run

restrictions: Must have completed "The Trickster's Delight (Brig)"

An elf bard appears in each area with the Masked Man.
Until the elf bard is destroyed, the Masked Man is invulnerable. Every time the elf bard attacks, the damage of the Masked Man is increased by 100%. 

Getting to know Brig Hellclaw: Brig's Critical Moment ability helps turn up the volume when you're at your wall, or in a boss area. Make sure he's ready to play when the Masked Man arrives!

items.name: Free Play (Brig)
restrictions: Must have completed "The Trickster's Delight (Brig)"
No restrictions

items.name: Dhampiric Nature
restrictions: Must have completed "The Crypt of Legends (Widdle)"

Widdle begins in the formation. She can't be moved or removed.
Undead Enemies deal 200% additional damage and move 200% faster.
Gold Find is reduced by 99%.

Getting to Know Widdle: Widdle charms her adjacent allies with her Vampiric Gaze, increasing their damage. However, as a Speed Champion, she also increases enemy spawn speed with each adjacent ally! Fill in your formation quickly, Widdle's at the wheel!

items.name: Strahd's Test
restrictions: Must have completed "The Crypt of Legends (Widdle)"

Widdle may have a vendetta against Strahd, but she's also eligible for his Patron variants. As such, the dark lord has set up a test for our latest Champion.
At each boss level, an additional undead boss appears.

items.name: A Widdle of This, A Widdle of That
restrictions: Must have completed "The Crypt of Legends (Widdle)"

Widdle begins in the formation. She can't be moved or removed.
The Base attack cooldown of all Champions is increased by 5 seconds. This increase does not affect Heroes of the Planes Champions.
A Giant Rat accompanies the formation, intent on becoming friends with Widdle's pet rat Gerard. Widdle said not to hurt it.

Getting to Know Widdle: Widdle's Hurry Up Now ability grants a chance for adjacent allies to have their base attack cooldown reset after attacking. Level her up quickly to gain access to this necessary skill for this variant.

items.name: Free Play (Widdle)
restrictions: Must have completed "The Crypt of Legends (Widdle)"
No restrictions

items.name: Raven Swarm
restrictions: Must have completed "The Simril Spoilsport (Yorven)"

Yorven starts in your formation and can't be moved or removed.
Three ravens appear in each area. The ravens drop no gold, nor do they count towards quest progress.
Every 10 areas an additional raven spawns in the swarm, capped at 50 ravens.

Getting to Know Yorven: If you choose the Hunger for Blood specialization, once Yorven defeats an enemy, he'll jump to another enemy to attack them as well!

items.name: Fangclaw
restrictions: Must have completed "The Simril Spoilsport (Yorven)"

In each boss area, a vicious rabbit boss enemy appears. It must also be defeated in order to progress. 
Gold Find is reduced by 99%
Only Champions with DEX of 14 or higher can be used.

items.name: Raven Queen's Memories
restrictions: Must have completed "The Simril Spoilsport (Yorven)"

Yorven Springpaw is haunted by his time in the shadowfell.
A Wraith escorts the formation - increasing the base attack cooldown of each adjacent Champion by 4 seconds. 
If Yorven is in the formation, the increase is only 2 seconds. 
Enemies move 200% faster.

items.name: Free Play (Yorven)
restrictions: Must have completed "The Simril Spoilsport (Yorven)"
No restrictions

items.name: Wandering Patrols
restrictions: Must have completed "The Merry Map Misadventure (Viconia)"

Viconia joins the formation. She can be moved but not removed from the formation. Flaming Fist Soldiers spawn with each wave, they don't drop gold, nor do they count towards quest progress. Gold Find is reduced by 99%.

items.name: Think About It
restrictions: Must have completed "The Merry Map Misadventure (Viconia)"

Only Champions with INT 13 or higher can be used. Each wave spawns Drow Rangers that fire their ranged attack at a random Champion. These attacks also stun any non-elf Champion for 2 seconds due to sleep poison.

items.name: Snarky Map
restrictions: Must have completed "The Merry Map Misadventure (Viconia)"

Only Evil Champions and other Heroes of Baldur's Gate Champions can deal damage. Enemies move 200% faster and deal 500% additional damage. Getting to know Viconia: Viconia buffs both evil Champions and other Heroes of Baldur's Gate. Use these types of Champions to get the most out of her support abilities!

items.name: Free Play (Viconia)
restrictions: Must have completed "The Merry Map Misadventure (Viconia)"
No restrictions

items.name: Gold Devourer
restrictions: Must have completed "Deadwinter Day (Rust)"

Rust begins in the formation. He can't be moved or removed from the formation. 
The Devourer appears as a secondary boss on area 25. It must be defeated in order to advance.
Gold Find is reduced by 99%.
Gold Find is increased by 200% for each Champion with the "Gold" role, stacking multiplicatively.
Getting to know Rust: Rust increases your damage based on your total gold find. Use gold find buffing Champions in your formation to boost his support abilities!

items.name: Deadwinter Drama
restrictions: Must have completed "Deadwinter Day (Rust)"

Only Champions with CON of 14 or higher can be used. 
Every area, frozen skeleton archers that attack a random Champion from range appear. These enemies do not drop gold, nor do they count towards quest progress. 
If any undead enemy attacks a Champion, that Champion is stunned for 1 second.

items.name: Heads or Tails
restrictions: Must have completed "Deadwinter Day (Rust)"

Rust begins in the formation (slot 6). He can't be moved or removed from the formation. 
When Rust is not holding his shiny gold piece, adjacent champions damage is disabled
When Rust is holding his shiny gold piece, non-adjacent champion damage is disabled

items.name: Free Play (Rust)
restrictions: Must have completed "Deadwinter Day (Rust)"
No restrictions

items.name: Timing is Everything
restrictions: Must have completed "The Missing Merchants (Vi)"

Vi starts in the formation. She can be moved to other slots, but she can't be removed from the formation.
Vi's Arcane Cannon ultimate starts out unlocked.
All Champion Base Attack cooldown speeds are increased by 8 seconds.
If you activate Vi's second use of her Arcane Cannon ultimate in the last 5 seconds of the ultimate's duration, it's cooldown is immediately reset.
Getting to know Vi: Vi's ultimate has a second stage that you might lose if you forget to activate it. Learn how to get the most out of it!

items.name: Time For a Good Hug
restrictions: Must have completed "The Missing Merchants (Vi)"

Vi starts in the formation. She can't be moved or removed from the formation.
You can only use Neutral on good/evil axis and Evil Champions that have the DPS role, and you can only use Good Champions that have the Support role.
Getting to know Vi: Vi likes formations where you surround a neutral Champion with good ones. Figure out how to use it to your advantage!

items.name: Double Our Efforts
restrictions: Must have completed "The Missing Merchants (Vi)"

Two Explorers join the formation. They deal no damage and can't be moved.
Good Champions deal no damage with their base attacks.
All non-boss area quest requirements are doubled, twice as many monsters spawn with each wave, and monsters drop half the amount of gold.

items.name: Free Play (Vi)
restrictions: Must have completed "The Missing Merchants (Vi)"
No restrictions

items.name: Full Moon Madness
restrictions: Must have completed "The Unfair Sea (Desmond)" Costs 250 Fresh Fishes to start

Desmond joins the formation. He can't be moved or removed from the formation.
In Non-Boss areas, each wave creates an extra 3-5 random sailors. They do not drop gold, or count towards quest progress.
Getting to know Desmond: Desmond attack speed-up during the full moon can help you cut through hordes of enemies. Use his specialization to make the most of this!

items.name: New Moon Nemesis
restrictions: Must have completed "The Unfair Sea (Desmond)" Costs 625 Fresh Fishes to start

Desmond joins the formation. He can't be moved or removed from the formation.
In Non-Boss areas, each wave spawns one additional Armored Crab with 10 armored HP. It does not drop gold or count towards quest progress.
Every time a crab spawns, a random Champion is stunned until it is defeated.
Getting to know Desmond: Desmond's damage boost during the new moon can help you get through heavily armored foes. Use his specialization to make the most of this!

items.name: Strength to Persevere
restrictions: Must have completed "The Unfair Sea (Desmond)" Costs 1250 Fresh Fishes to start

Only Champions with a STR of 16 or higher may be used.
A werewolf starts in the formation, an additional werewolf joins the formation every 100 areas. Until there are six werewolves in the formation.
Getting to know Desmond: Desmond increases the damage of the formation when slots are filled with escorts (or dead Champions). Use him to reduce the sting of missing formation slots!

items.name: Free Play (Desmond)
restrictions: Must have completed "The Unfair Sea (Desmond)" Costs up to 2500 Fresh Fishes to start
No restrictions

items.name: I'm HUNGRY!
restrictions: Must have completed "A Fool's Errand (Tatyana)" Costs 250 Pennants to start

Tatyana starts in the formation. She can't be moved or removed from the formation.
Quest requirements are doubled.
Tatyana's "Find a Feast" ability starts out unlocked.
Enemies spawned by Tatyana's "Find a Feast" ability count for 5x quest progress.
Getting to know Tatyana: When Tatyana hasn't been attacked in a while, she'll run off screen to find snacks (and more enemies to fight).

items.name: Exclusive Friend Club
restrictions: Must have completed "A Fool's Errand (Tatyana)" Costs 625 Pennants to start

Tatyana starts in the formation. She can't be moved or removed from the formation.
In area 51 and beyond, only Tatyana, and the Champions affected by Tatyana's Faithful Friend can deal damage.
Getting to know Tatyana: Tatyana buffs a random slot with her Faithful Friend ability. Use her specializations to increase the number of slots affected.

items.name: Tanks a Lot!
restrictions: Must have completed "A Fool's Errand (Tatyana)" Costs 1250 Pennants to start

Every 5 seconds, each champion takes damage which increases the further you get in the adventure.
Getting to know Tatyana: Tanks like Tatyana often protect your Champions by granting additional health. Include them to offset the constant damage!

items.name: Free Play (Tatyana)
restrictions: Must have completed "A Fool's Errand (Tatyana)" Costs up to 2500 Pennants to start
No restrictions

items.name: Cool Comrades
restrictions: Must have completed "The Endless War (Gazrick)"

Gazrick starts in the formation. He can't be moved or removed from the formation.
Two Ice Mephits have befriended Gazrick. It's not weird.
Getting to know Gazrick: Gazrick's main support ability gets stronger with distance in a straight line. Place your damage dealers to get the most out of Gazrick's buffs!

items.name: Brain Freeze
restrictions: Must have completed "The Endless War (Gazrick)"

Gazrick starts in the formation. He can't be moved or removed from the formation.
Gazrick has created three Snow Golems companions. Each Golem has an intellect devourer perched on their head. It's not weird.
Only Champions with an INT score of 13 or higher can be used.
It's snowing in all areas where there is not already weather set.
Getting to know Gazrick: Gazrick's main support ability can still support through gaps in the formation. Place your damage dealers to get the most out of Gazrick's buffs!

items.name: Armored Assault
restrictions: Must have completed "The Endless War (Gazrick)"

Gazrick starts in the formation. He can be moved, but he can't be removed. His Armor Ablation ability starts unlocked.
All boss enemies have at least 25 armored health.
Armored enemies require 100% more damage to deal one armored hit.
Gazrick's Armor Ablation ability is +100% more effective.
Getting to Know Gazrick: Gazrick's attacks can weaken armor. Use his specialization and increase his attack speed to make the most of this feature!

items.name: Free Play (Gazrick)
restrictions: Must have completed "The Endless War (Gazrick)"
No restrictions

items.name: Revenge of Venger
restrictions: Must have completed "The Grandfather Acorn (Dungeon Master)"

Only Champions that are 40 years old or younger can be used.
At the start of each Boss area, Venger arrives on his nightmare as an additional boss that must be defeated.
Getting to know Dungeon Master: Dungeon Master is eligible for all adventures even if restrictions say otherwise. Try adding him to your formation to improve these youngsters!

items.name: Ultimate Madness
restrictions: Must have completed "The Grandfather Acorn (Dungeon Master)"

Dungeon Master starts in the formation with his ultimate unlocked. He can be moved but not removed.
All Champion base attacks deal 99% less damage.
All Champion ultimate attacks deal 10,000% more damage.
Ultimate cooldowns take half as long.
Getting to know Dungeon Master: Dungeon Master's ultimate ability allows you to recharge another Champion's ultimate use. Use it to get the most out of your favorite damaging ultimate!

items.name: It's Tiamat, the Dragon!
restrictions: Must have completed "The Grandfather Acorn (Dungeon Master)"

Dungeon Master starts in the formation with Words of Encouragement unlocked. He can be moved but not removed.
Champions only regain 50% of their max hit points when changing areas.
At the start of each area, Tiamat has a 75% chance to show up. She briefly appears and breathes on the Champions, dealing 90% of the Champion's max health in damage if the Champion does not have any temporary hit points, but only wiping out the temp HP if they do.
Getting to know Dungeon Master: Dungeon Master grants temporary health at the start of areas when he doesn't run off to do his own thing. Use his specialization to make it more likely he sticks around if Tiamat is giving you grief.

items.name: Free Play (Dungeon Master)
restrictions: Must have completed "The Grandfather Acorn (Dungeon Master)"
No restrictions

items.name: Rogue Modron Hunting
restrictions: Must have completed "The Mechanical Menace (Nordom)" Costs 250 Rusted Gears to start

Nordom starts in the formation. He can't be moved or removed.
Nordom is hunted by Duodrones and Pentadrones! They drop no gold, nor do they count towards quest progress.
Getting to know Nordom: Nordom increases the damage of Champions in the column in front of him. Use this to defeat these rogue modron hunters!

items.name: A Lawful Lot of Champions
restrictions: Must have completed "The Mechanical Menace (Nordom)" Costs 625 Rusted Gears to start

Nordom starts in the formation. He can't be moved or removed.
Chaotic Champions can't be used, and Neutral champions on the law/chaos axis deal no damage but can still use their formation abilities.
Getting to know Nordom: Based on the Modron Core attached to his party, Nordom's buffs change. When his party has no core attached to it, he increases his buff based on the number of Lawful Champions in your formation.

items.name: Core Strength
restrictions: Must have completed "The Mechanical Menace (Nordom)" Costs 1250 Rusted Gears to start

Nordom starts in the formation. He can't be moved or removed.
Potions of Speed gain a 100% duration bonus.
You may only use Champions with the Speed tag and/or Champions with a STR of 16 or higher.
Getting to know Nordom: If you have a Modron Core, Nordom has a specialization choice that increases the rate it gains levels. Use some speed Champions to maximize this ability!

items.name: Free Play (Nordom)
restrictions: Must have completed "The Mechanical Menace (Nordom)" Costs up to 2500 Rusted Gears to start
No restrictions

items.name: A Neutral Position
restrictions: Must have completed "Let Sleeping Dragons Lie (Merilwen)"

Merilwen starts in the formation. She can be moved, but not removed.
Only Neutral Champions (on the g/e axis) can deal damage.
Getting to Know Merilwen: Merilwen increases the damage of Neutral champions. Use a Neutral DPS Champion to make the most of this!

items.name: Cat Nap
restrictions: Must have completed "Let Sleeping Dragons Lie (Merilwen)"

Merilwen starts in the formation. She can be moved, but not removed.
Champions' Normal attack cooldowns are increased by 3 seconds.
Merilwen's Wild Shape ability starts out unlocked and offers an additional 1.5 second bonus to attack speed cooldowns.
Getting to Know Merilwen: Merilwen's cat form makes nearby Champions attack faster. Use this to your advantage!

items.name: Loyal Friends
restrictions: Must have completed "Let Sleeping Dragons Lie (Merilwen)"

Merilwen starts in the formation. She can be moved, but not removed.
Only Champions with an Affiliation may be used, and Oxventurers Champions do 400% more damage.
Merilwen's Ultimate starts unlocked and its cooldown takes half as long.
Getting to Know Merilwen: Merilwen's ultimate grows stronger with other Oxventurers Champions. Try it out if you have already unlocked some of them!

items.name: Free Play (Merilwen)
restrictions: Must have completed "Let Sleeping Dragons Lie (Merilwen)"
No restrictions

items.name: Durable Devils
restrictions: Must have completed "Party Crashers (Nahara)"

Nahara starts in the formation. She can be moved, but not removed.
Armored Imps appear in each area. They do not drop gold, nor do they count towards quest progress.
Getting to Know Nahara: If Nahara attacks an enemy and doesn't defeat it, she'll continue to target it until it is vanquished.

items.name: Double Trouble
restrictions: Must have completed "Party Crashers (Nahara)"

Nahara starts in the formation. She can be moved, but not removed.
Normal area requirements are doubled.
Getting to Know Nahara: When Nahara is easily taking out enemies, she decreases the next area's requirements. Unlock her "To Amuse or Avenge" to progress faster!

items.name: Barovian Bliss
restrictions: Must have completed "Party Crashers (Nahara)"

The weather is foggy in all areas.
Only Champions with an INT of 13+ and/or Black Dice Society affiliation members may be used.
Each boss area features Strahd as an additional boss that must be defeated to progress.
Getting to know Nahara: Nahara's ties to Strahd means she's always available to adventure when he is your patron.

items.name: Free Play (Nahara)
restrictions: Must have completed "Party Crashers (Nahara)"
No restrictions

items.name: Tregrum's Day Out
restrictions: Must have completed "The Missing Lord (Valentine)"
A black cat joins the formation. There's nothing strange about it at all, although Champions next to it are distracted and their normal attack cooldown increases by 5 seconds.

items.name: Stunning Teamwork
restrictions: Must have completed "The Missing Lord (Valentine)"

Valentine starts in the formation.
Monsters take 99% less damage while they are not stunned.
All stun effects last twice as long.
Getting to Know Valentine: Valentine's normal attack has a chance to stun enemies. Use her and other Champions that stun to get through this!

items.name: Positional Play
restrictions: Must have completed "The Missing Lord (Valentine)"

Valentine starts in the formation. She can be moved, but not removed.
You may only use Champions that have positional formation abilities.
Valentine can still be used even though she doesn't have a positional formation ability.
Getting to Know Valentine: A positional formation ability depends on a champion's spot in the formation. Valentine's features improve as more positional abilities affect her!

items.name: Free Play (Valentine)
restrictions: Must have completed "The Missing Lord (Valentine)"
No restrictions

items.name: The Fringe of Society
restrictions: Must have completed "Reclaiming the Past (Voronika)"

Voronika starts in your formation and can't be moved or removed.
Only Black Dice Society affiliation members, Evil Champions, Debuff Champions, or Champions with a Favored Foe can deal damage.
Getting to know Voronika: Voronika's support abilities increase with specific types of Champions in the formation, based on the specialization you choose.

items.name: Ultimate Challenge
restrictions: Must have completed "Reclaiming the Past (Voronika)"

Voronika starts in your formation and can't be removed.
After area 25, Champions deal no damage unless at least one Ultimate is on cooldown.
Getting to know Voronika: Voronika increases her damage buff for the rest of the adventure each time an ultimate is used. Use those ultimates to increase Voronika's power!

items.name: In Search of Power
restrictions: Must have completed "Reclaiming the Past (Voronika)"

Voronika starts in your formation and can't be removed. Her base level-up cost is reduced by 99%.
Two Eladrin bodyguards join the formation.
Additional Orc Fighters attack with each wave. They don't drop gold nor count for quest progress.
Getting to know Voronika: Voronika achieves her Darklord form after you achieve her 3 goals. Level her up, use ultimate attacks, and complete the goal you choose via her specialization to get that crown!

items.name: Free Play (Voronika)
restrictions: Must have completed "Reclaiming the Past (Voronika)"
No restrictions

items.name: Half-Orc's Charm
restrictions: Must have completed "Brightly into Darkness (Dob)"

Dob starts in the formation. He can't be moved or removed.
Champions next to Dob deal no damage.
Getting to Know Dob: Dob increases the damage of Champions NOT next to him. Place your DPS Champions away from him!

items.name: Making Friends
restrictions: Must have completed "Brightly into Darkness (Dob)"

Dob starts in the formation. He can be moved, but not removed.
Only Champions with a Charisma and/or Dexterity of 17+ may be used.
Getting to Know Dob: Dob's specialization has the potential to greatly enhance your formation. Pick the one that is best for your Champions!

items.name: Skeletons! (on Strike)
restrictions: Must have completed "Brightly into Darkness (Dob)"

Dob starts in the formation. He can be moved, but not removed.Dob's Ultimate starts unlocked and its cooldown duration is half as long.Each wave in non-boss areas spawns a relentless Striking Skeleton. They are slow, but they deal 400% damage. In addition, if they are defeated, they respawn in the same location after 5 seconds.Getting To Know Dob: Dob's attacks can prevent dangerous opponents from reaching the formation. Use him and other knockback attacks to keep the Striking Skeletons away!

items.name: Free Play (Dob)
restrictions: Must have completed "Brightly into Darkness (Dob)"
No restrictions

items.name: Keep Your Friends Close
items.campaign: Icewind Dale: Rime of the Frostmaiden
restrictions: Must have completed "Cold as Ice"

Kingsport, the awakened giant penguin, joins the formation in an effort to not have him fall into a trap this time. In Area 50, the other Gelatinous Cubes are invulnerable until the one with Kingsport in it is destroyed. Enemies move 100% faster and deal 100% additional damage.

items.name: Willing to Sacrifice
items.campaign: Icewind Dale: Rime of the Frostmaiden
restrictions:
Must have completed "Cold as Ice"
Must have completed 60 Rime of the Frostmaiden adventures or variants

Only Chaotic Evil champions can deal damage.
After every 50 areas, a random active non-Chaotic Evil Champion is permanently removed from the formation.
Once a Champion is added to the formation they can not be removed.

items.name: Pay the Price
items.campaign: Icewind Dale: Rime of the Frostmaiden
restrictions: Must have completed "Cold as Ice"

You may only use Champions with the gold find role.
1-2 Mezzoloth mercenaries spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress.
Other enemies drop 99.99% less gold.

items.name: Free Play
items.campaign: Icewind Dale: Rime of the Frostmaiden
restrictions: Must have completed "Cold as Ice"
No restrictions

items.name: And Your Enemies Closer
items.campaign: Icewind Dale: Rime of the Frostmaiden
restrictions: Must have completed "Friends and Foes"

The Professor Orb appears in each area with 3 armored HP. Until it is destroyed, all enemies are invulnerable. Champions will prioritize attacking the Professor Orb if possible. Only Champions with INT of 14 or higher can be used.

items.name: Devilishly Cold
items.campaign: Icewind Dale: Rime of the Frostmaiden
restrictions:
Must have completed "Friends and Foes"
Must have completed 61 Rime of the Frostmaiden adventures or variants

You may only use Tiefling Champions.
It's snowing in each area. Brr!

items.name: Fiendishly Fierce
items.campaign: Icewind Dale: Rime of the Frostmaiden
restrictions: Must have completed "Friends and Foes"

You may only use Drow Champions.
1-2 Spined Devils spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress.
You may not remove Champions from the formation. (They can be moved as normal.)
Non-boss area requirements are reduced by 5% for each empty formation slot, stacking additively.

items.name: Free Play
items.campaign: Icewind Dale: Rime of the Frostmaiden
restrictions: Must have completed "Friends and Foes"
No restrictions

items.name: Nightmare Rats!
restrictions: Must have completed "Tall Tales"
Squiddly & Jenks join the formation. Burning Rats appear in each area. They don't drop any gold, nor do they count towards quest progress.

items.name: An Unexpected Geist
restrictions:
Must have completed "Tall Tales"
Must have completed 4 Wild Beyond the Witchlight adventures or variants
One Specter appears in each wave. They drop no gold, nor do they count towards quest progress. When they are killed, they respawn in the same location after 5 seconds. The Specters move 200% faster.

items.name: Back to Nature
restrictions:
Must have completed "Tall Tales"
Must have completed 13 Wild Beyond the Witchlight adventures or variants

A Shambling Mound joins the formation. They're so big they take up three spots in your formation, but don't do much else.
Only Elves, Half-Elves, and Gnomes (of any class) and Druids, Barbarians, and Rangers (of any race) can be used.

items.name: Free Play
restrictions: Must have completed "Tall Tales"
No restrictions

items.name: A Monarch Among Us
restrictions: Must have completed "The Witchlight Carnival"
Nat joins the formation. Enemies move 100% faster and deal 100% additional damage. Gold Find is reduced by 99%.

items.name: A Dragon Against Us
restrictions:
Must have completed "The Witchlight Carnival"
Must have completed 5 Wild Beyond the Witchlight adventures or variants
Green Dragon Wyrmlings appear in each area. They drop no gold, nor do they count towards quest progress. Only Champions with DEX of 15 or higher can be used.

items.name: A Familiar Behind Us
restrictions:
Must have completed "The Witchlight Carnival"
Must have completed 14 Wild Beyond the Witchlight adventures or variants

Champions' normal attack cooldown is increased by 5 seconds. Gale the Miniature Giant Seahorse joins the formation. Champions next to Gale have their normal attack cooldown decreased by 1 second for each familiar assigned to click enemies. Only Champions with a Charisma of 16 or higher may be used.

items.name: Free Play
restrictions: Must have completed "The Witchlight Carnival"
No restrictions

items.name: Sticky Fingers
restrictions: Must have completed "Thieves of the Coven"
Sowpig appears in each boss area with 4 armored HP and you must defeat her to progress. Gold Find is reduced by 99%.

items.name: Patron Party
restrictions:
Must have completed "Thieves of the Coven"
Must have completed 10 Wild Beyond the Witchlight adventures or variants
Escort Redeemed Zariel in slot 3, Mirt in slot 7, and Vajra in slot 9.

items.name: Go Fourth
restrictions:
Must have completed "Thieves of the Coven"
Must have completed 19 Wild Beyond the Witchlight adventures or variants
Only Event Champions from Year Four can be used.

items.name: Free Play
restrictions: Must have completed "Thieves of the Coven"
No restrictions

items.name: Don't Breathe the Marsh Gas
restrictions: Must have completed "Hither of the Feywild"
Additional Marsh Gas Bubbles appear in each area. They don't drop gold, nor do they count towards quest progress. Only Champions with a Ranged or Magical base attack can be used.

items.name: Don't Blast the Brigands
restrictions:
Must have completed "Hither of the Feywild"
Must have completed 11 Wild Beyond the Witchlight adventures or variants

Additional Harengon Brigands appear in each area. They don't drop gold, nor do they count towards quest progress. Fog is everywhere, impeding ranged attack. Only Champions with a melee or Magical base attack can be used.

items.name: Don't Squeeze the Spiders
restrictions:
Must have completed "Hither of the Feywild"
Must have completed 20 Wild Beyond the Witchlight adventures or variants

Additional Giant Spiders appear in each area. They don't drop gold, nor do they count towards quest progress.
Only Champions with a melee or ranged base attack can be used.
Champions' base attack cooldowns are increased by 3 seconds.

items.name: Free Play
restrictions: Must have completed "Hither of the Feywild"
No restrictions

items.name: Always Watching
items.campaign: Icewind Dale: Rime of the Frostmaiden
restrictions: Must have completed "The Spire of Iriolarthas"
In each boss area, Iriolarthas the Demilich appears. He must be defeated in order to progress. Only Champions with WIS of 14 or higher can be used.

items.name: Rulebreakers
items.campaign: Icewind Dale: Rime of the Frostmaiden
restrictions:
Must have completed "The Spire of Iriolarthas"
Must have completed 66 Rime of the Frostmaiden adventures or variants

You may only use Chaotic Champions.
1-2 Harmonium Peacekeepers spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold or count towards quest progress.

items.name: Class Clown
items.campaign: Icewind Dale: Rime of the Frostmaiden
restrictions: Must have completed "The Spire of Iriolarthas"

You may only use Chaotic Champions.
Champion damage is reduced by 99% for each Champion in the formation that is not a Bard, stacking multiplicatively.
1-2 ranged Space Clowns attack with each wave. They don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress.

items.name: Free Play
items.campaign: Icewind Dale: Rime of the Frostmaiden
restrictions: Must have completed "The Spire of Iriolarthas"
No restrictions

items.name: Icequake
items.campaign: Icewind Dale: Rime of the Frostmaiden
restrictions: Must have completed "The Fall of Ythryn"

- From area 30 onward, an earthquake occurs every 20-120 seconds. Earthquakes cause falling pieces of ice hit the Champions, dealing damage equal to 75% of their max health and stunning them for 15 seconds, subject to a DEX save. 
- The earthquake also triggers the following effects for 15 seconds if one or more Champions fail the save.
  - Champion damage is reduced by 99.9%.
  - Enemies move 200% faster.

items.name: A Lesson in Classes
items.campaign: Icewind Dale: Rime of the Frostmaiden
restrictions: Must have completed "The Fall of Ythryn"

- Xerophon joins the formation for this adventure to see what it's like to fight alongside the Champions. They don't attack, they're just here to observe. 
- Only one Champion of each class can be included in the formation at any time. Multiclass Champions count for all of their classes. Xerophon does not have a class for this variant.
- In an attempt to distract and confuse the enemies, Xerophon transforms into the first enemy who spawns in each area, increasing damage against that type of enemy by 100% for the rest of the area.

items.name: Xerophon's Ythryn Zenith
items.campaign: Icewind Dale: Rime of the Frostmaiden
restrictions: Must have completed all other Icewind Dale: Rime of the Frostmaiden adventures and variants.

Xerophon starts in the formation with their ultimate unlocked. They can be moved, but not removed.
After area 10, Champions can only deal damage while Xerophon is imitating an enemy with their Perfect Imitation ultimate attack.
Champions can't be removed from the formation once they have been added.
Every 50 areas, a random Champion that matches the highest number of Xerophon's specialization choices is removed from the formation and can not be used again in the adventure. In the case of a tie, a random tied Champion is picked. If you have not chosen any spec choices for Xerophon, a random Champion is picked. Xerophon themself is never removed.
Fire breath potions can't be used during the adventure, and click damage has no effect after area 100.

items.name: Free Play
items.campaign: Icewind Dale: Rime of the Frostmaiden
restrictions: Must have completed "The Fall of Ythryn"
No restrictions

items.name: Uncommon Allies
restrictions: Must have completed "The Prince of a Thousand Enemies"

Only Champions with a Magical base attack can be used.
Whenever a Champion attacks and doesn't kill at least one monster, the Champion is stunned for 5 seconds.

restrictions: Must have completed "The Prince of a Thousand Enemies"
No restrictions

restrictions: Must have completed "Downfall"
No restrictions

They don't drop gold, or count towards quest progress.
In Boss areas, The second wave spawns a Taxidermy Monstrosity boss enemy. It must also be defeated to progress.

restrictions:

No restrictions

restrictions: Must have completed "The Fairy Rings of Thither"

A Bullywug joins the formation. Every 25 areas the bullywug leaps to a new formation slot of the Champion from the bench seat with the most available Champions.
Any Champion the Bullywug leaps on is knocked out for the rest of the adventure.
Champions can't be removed from the formation once they have been added.
Fire breath potions can't be used during the adventure, and click damage has no effect after area 100.

restrictions: Must have completed "Xanathaaaaaaar!"

1-2 Shadar-kai Warriors spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress.
In Boss areas, 5 additional Shadar-kai Warriors spawn with the first two waves. They also need to be defeated to progress.

items.name: Free Play
restrictions: Must have completed Xanathaaaaaaaaaar!
No restrictions

items.name: Delay Tactics
restrictions: Must have completed "The Bandit's Harvest (Egbert)"

Egbert starts in the formation. He can't be moved or removed.
Enemies can take at most 10% of their max health per hit in damage for the first 10 seconds after they appear.
Speed potions last twice as long.
Getting to know Egbert: Egbert's Homemade Bomb attack knocks back enemies. Delay your enemies with this and other similar abilities!

items.name: Kicked out of Le Dragon d'Or
restrictions: Must have completed "The Bandit's Harvest (Egbert)"

Egbert starts in the formation and his Atonement of the Past ability starts out unlocked. He can't be moved or removed.
If Egbert has positive Atonement points, only Lawful Champions can deal damage. Otherwise, only Chaotic Champions can deal damage.
Getting to know Egbert: Egbert's Atonement for his past actions depends on the alignment of his companions. Try to maximize the absolute value of his Atonement points!

items.name: Egbert the Careless
restrictions: Must have completed "The Bandit's Harvest (Egbert)"

- Egbert starts in the formation. (Slot 0) He can't be moved or removed.
- Every 10 seconds, Egbert accidentally drops a lit bomb which bounces back and explodes, dealing a random amount of damage up to the area's number to a random Champion (other than Egbert) and anyone standing next to them. The damage doubles every 100 areas.
- Getting to know Egbert: As a tank and healer, Egbert helps make your Champions more resilient to damage. They're going to need it.

items.name: Free Play (Egbert)
restrictions: Must have completed "The Bandit's Harvest (Egbert)"
No restrictions

items.name: Bossing Around
restrictions: Must have completed "The Trickster's Delight (Kent)"

Kent begins in the formation. He can't be removed.
There is an additional wave of enemies in each boss area.
Bosses have 3 times the health and deal 3 times the damage.
Getting to know Kent: Kent's buff increases as you defeat higher level bosses while he is in the formation. Get him as far as you can in an event and in each campaign to maximize his buff!

items.name: Quick and Quick-Witted
restrictions: Must have completed "The Trickster's Delight (Kent)"

Kent begins in the formation. He can't be removed.
You may only use Champions with a Dexterity and Charisma of 13 or higher. Champions affiliated with the Rivals of Waterdeep are also allowed.
Getting to know Kent: Kent's damage increases each time he makes an attack. Speed up his attack with other Champions to increase his damage faster!

items.name: The Poisoned Rat Incident
restrictions: Must have completed "The Trickster's Delight (Kent)"

Kent begins in the formation. He can't be removed.
Each wave spawns 1-3 Giant Rats. They don't drop gold, nor do they count towards quest progress.
The first time an enemy is hit by a normal attack, they only take 1 point of damage.
Getting to know Kent: Kent's Potent Poison specialization deals ongoing damage. Use it to take out those pesky rats!

items.name: Free Play (Kent)
restrictions: Must have completed "The Trickster's Delight (Kent)"
No restrictions

items.name: Eye of the Storm
restrictions: Must have completed "The Crypt of Legends (Virgil)".

Virgil begins in the formation. He can't be moved or removed.
Only Champions next to Virgil can deal damage.
Getting to know Virgil: Virgil increases the damage and attack speeds of Champions next to him. Place your Champions carefully to best benefit from this!

items.name: An Inseparable Bond
restrictions: Must have completed "The Crypt of Legends (Virgil)".

Virgil begins in the formation. He can't be removed.
You may only use Champions with a Wisdom of 12 or higher.
Getting to know Virgil: Virgil and Kent's inseparable bond means when one is eligible for an adventure, the other is too. Try adding Kent to formation to try it out!

items.name: Freak Weather Conditions
restrictions: Must have completed "The Crypt of Legends (Virgil)".

Virgil begins in the formation. He can't be removed.
Every 5 areas, the weather drastically changes. While snowing, all Champions' normal attack cooldown speeds are increased by 5 seconds. While thundering, a bolt of lightning strikes a random Champion every 5 seconds dealing damage equal to 50% of their max health and stunning them for 5 seconds. While foggy, Champions deal no damage with ranged attacks.
Getting to know Virgil: Virgil's buff increases each time the weather changes. See if you can find other ways to change the weather for an even greater buff!

items.name: Free Play (Virgil)
restrictions: Must have completed "The Crypt of Legends (Virgil)".
No restrictions

items.name: A Figure of Action
restrictions: Must have completed "The Simril Spoilsport (Warduke)"

Warduke joins the formation.
He can't be moved or removed.
Warduke's normal attack speed cooldown is reduced by 1 second.
All other Champions have their normal attack speed cooldown increased by 3 seconds.
Getting to Know Warduke: Warduke's damage increases each time he attacks or is attacked.
This damage bonus resets when moving to a new area.

items.name: Yield!
restrictions: Must have completed "The Simril Spoilsport (Warduke)"

Warduke joins the formation. He can't be moved or removed.
Only Evil Champions, Chaotic Champions, or Champions with the Gold Find role can be used.
Strongheart spawns in each boss area. He must additionally be defeated to progress.
Getting to Know Warduke: Warduke's damage increases based on what specialization you pick.
Choose the best one for the champions you use!

items.name: Strike that, Reverse it
restrictions: Must have completed "The Simril Spoilsport (Warduke)"

Warduke joins the formation. He can't be moved or removed.
You may only use Champions that have positional formation abilities.
Warduke can still be used even though he doesn't have a positional formation abilities.
Getting to Know Warduke: Warduke inverts many positional formation abilities. This means your Champions will buff the opposite slots that they normally do!

items.name: Free Play (Warduke)
restrictions: Must have completed "The Simril Spoilsport (Warduke)"
No restrictions

items.name: Heya! It's me, Imoen!
restrictions: Must have completed "The Merry Map Misadventure (Imoen)"

Imoen joins the formation. She can't be moved or removed.
Only Imoen and Champions next to her can deal damage.
Getting to Know Imoen: Imoen increases the damage of Champions next to her. Place your damage dealers near her to make the most of this!

items.name: Mutton Mongering Riff Raff
restrictions: Must have completed "The Merry Map Misadventure (Imoen)"

Imoen joins the formation. She can't be moved or removed.
1-2 Beasts spawn with every wave. They don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress.
Getting to know Imoen: Imoen's specialization lets you pick a Favored Foe. Her buffs increase as these foes appear and are defeated.

items.name: Gotta Go Fast To Cast Fast
restrictions: Must have completed "The Merry Map Misadventure (Imoen)"

You may only use Champions with an INT of 12 or higher, and/or Champions from the Heroes of Baldur's Gate affiliation.
Imoen joins the formation. She can be moved, but not removed.
Imoen's base attack cooldown is reduced by 0.5 seconds for each Champion next to her.
1-2 Monstrosities spawn with every wave. They don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress.
Getting to know Imoen: Imoen casts Polymorph and Stoneskin after a certain number of attacks. Reduce her attack cooldown to cast them more often.

items.name: Free Play (Imoen)
restrictions: Must have completed "The Merry Map Misadventure (Imoen)"
No restrictions

items.name: Mirtwinter Day
restrictions: Must have completed "Deadwinter Day (Fen)"

Fen joins the formation. She can be moved, but not removed.
Mirt joins the formation. Only Champions in Mirt's column can deal damage.
Getting to know Fen:  Fen increases the damage of all Champions in her column, including herself.

items.name: The Wise and the Warlocks
restrictions: Must have completed "Deadwinter Day (Fen)"

Fen joins the formation. She can be moved, but not removed.
Vajra and redeemed Zariel join the formation. They're here for moral support.
You may only use Warlocks, Black Dice Society Champions, or Champions with WIS 15+.
Getting to Know Fen: Surround Fen with Champions that have high Wisdom scores to make her (and other Warlocks) attack faster!

items.name: Oh Great, More Mist!
restrictions: Must have completed "Deadwinter Day (Fen)"

Fen joins the formation. She can be moved, but not removed.
The weather is foggy.
You can't use Champions with ranged attacks, except for Desmond.
1-2 zombies spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress.
Strahd spawns as a second boss in each boss area. He must also be defeated to progress.
Getting to Know Fen: Now that you've unlocked her, you can use Fen to speed up your progress in Patron challenges!

items.name: Free Play (Fen)
restrictions: Must have completed "Deadwinter Day (Fen)"
No restrictions

Brother Uriah joins the formation. He can't be moved or removed.
Only Champions in the middle two columns can deal damage.
Getting to Know Brother Uriah: Uriah increases the damage of Champions in his column and the column behind him. Place your damage dealing Champions to take advantage of this!

items.name: Perhaps an Escort is in Order?
restrictions: Must have completed "The Missing Merchants (Brother Uriah)"

Brother Uriah joins the formation. He can be moved, but not removed. Uriah's Ezra's Embrace ability starts unlocked.
Two Ravens join the formation.
Every 10 seconds, a boulder falls on a random Champion dealing 25% of their total health in damage.
Getting to Know Brother Uriah: Uriah can heal Champions within two slots of him. Place him to make the most of this!

items.name: Perhaps We Should Make Haste?
restrictions: Must have completed "The Missing Merchants (Brother Uriah)"

Brother Uriah joins the formation. He can be moved, but not removed.
You may only use Champions from the Black Dice Society affiliation or Champions with a normal attack cooldown of 5 seconds or less.
Getting to Know Azalin Rex: Azalin Rex has a mysterious tie to Brother Uriah. Increase the attack speed of your champions to spend more time with the darklord of Darkon!

items.name: Free Play (Brother Uriah)
restrictions: Must have completed "The Missing Merchants (Brother Uriah)"
No restrictions

items.name: On the Wings of Dragons
restrictions: Must have completed "The Unfair Sea (Solaak)" Costs 250 Fresh Fishes to start

Solaak, Tempest, and Levits join the formation. Levits can be moved, but not removed.
You may only use Champions with a DEX of 13 or higher.
Getting to know Solaak: Solaak's Pseudodragon pet Levits takes his place in the formation. Look for Solaak riding a drake in the back of the formation!

items.name: Slings and Arrows
restrictions: Must have completed "The Unfair Sea (Solaak)" Costs 625 Fresh Fishes to start

Solaak, Tempest, and Levits join the formation. Levits can be moved, but not removed.
The base attack cooldowns of Champions with magic and melee base attacks are increased by 10 seconds.
Getting to know Solaak: Solaak's buffs focus on Champions with ranged attacks. Make the best ranged formation possible!

items.name: A Scaly Companion
restrictions: Must have completed "The Unfair Sea (Solaak)" Costs 1250 Fresh Fishes to start

Solaak, Tempest, and Levits join the formation. Levits can be moved, but not removed.
A Bronze Dragon joins the formation as an escort. It takes up three spots in the formation, but doesn't do much else.
Getting to know Solaak: One of Solaak's specializations can help offset the presence of escorts in the formation. Choose wisely!

items.name: Free Play (Solaak)
restrictions: Must have completed "The Unfair Sea (Solaak)" Costs up to 2500 Fresh Fishes to start
No restrictions

restrictions: Must have completed "A Fool's Errand (Miria)" Costs 250 Pennants to start

Miria starts in the formation. She can be moved but not removed.
Only champions next to Miria can deal damage.
Getting to know Miria: Miria increases the damage of Champions next to her. Place your damage dealing champions to take advantage of this!

items.name: The Knight of the Black Rose
restrictions: Must have completed "A Fool's Errand (Miria)" Costs 625 Pennants to start

Miria starts in the formation. She can be moved but not removed.
Miria's Zombie Bodyguards ability starts out unlocked.
1-2 Skeleton Archers spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress.

items.name: Festival of Favorites

Miria starts in the formation. She can be moved but not removed.

restrictions: Must have completed "A Fool's Errand (Miria)" Costs up to 2500 Pennants to start
No restrictions

restrictions: Must have completed "The Endless War (Antrius)" Costs 250 Bouquets to start

Two reflections of Antrius take up slots in the formation. These reflections are just that, and don't actually have any of Antrius' abilities.
Getting to Know Antrius: Antrius is the most charming Bard in all the realms. Having 2 extra "copies" of him in your formation won't make this variant more challenging, right?

items.name: A Timely Tune
restrictions: Must have completed "The Endless War (Antrius)" Costs 625 Bouquets to start

Antrius starts in the formation. He can be moved, but not removed.
Antrius starts out with Inspiring Song unlocked.
After area 5, Champions' health is set to 1 and can not be healed above this.
1-3 Skeleton Archers spawn with each wave. These enemies attack random targets. They do not drop gold, or count towards quest progress.
Getting to Know Antrius: Antrius provides temporary hit points to nearby allies, and if those allies have a high enough Charisma they can pass it on. Spread the hit points to the whole formation to survive!

items.name: Pick Your Poison
restrictions: Must have completed "The Endless War (Antrius)" Costs 1250 Bouquets to start

Antrius starts in the formation. He can be moved, but not removed.
You can only use Champions who are Bards, or are Chaotic, or have a total ability score of 78 or lower.
Getting to Know Antrius: Antrius' specializations allow him to increase his damage buff based on the other Champions in the formation. Pick a specialization and build your formation around it to maximize your damage!

items.name: Free Play (Antrius)
restrictions: Must have completed "The Endless War (Antrius)" Costs up to 2500 Bouquets to start
No restrictions
